programme.desc: Bentley returns to the CIA while Tara travels abroad and Edwards digs deeper; Doug has nightmares.

programme.title: The Purge: Everything Is Fine
programme.desc: The city cleans up last night's Purge, but Ryan, Marcus, Esme and Ben can't shake its effects.

programme.title: Mr. Robot: 404 Not Found
programme.desc: Elliot, Mr. Robot and Tyrell are walking in a winter wonderland while Darlene meets a bad Santa and Dom is DTF.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Poison
programme.desc: The poisoning of a couple's adopted son prompts detectives to suspect the child's mother.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Ghost
programme.desc: A series of related murders are linked to the same criminal who killed Alexandra Cabot.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Blood
programme.desc: When a girl is assaulted, her attackers steal her car and toss her baby.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Possessed
programme.desc: The detectives try to find a Brooklyn DA, who is in danger, but do not make it in time. After learning that the crime scene was tampered with, Benson turns to an old friend for help.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Cool Change
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the Gribbs shooting, Brass is sent back to homicide. Grissom is made head of the CSI unit. He brings Sara Sidel from San Francisco to investigate the shooting. This irritates Catherine who wants to solve the case.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Touch of Death
programme.desc: The joint task force travels to Los Angeles when the lead suspect in their case moves to the mainland with a deadly virus in tow.

programme.title: NCIS: Red Cell
programme.desc: A marine is found murdered on the school campus, and the NCIS discovers a suspect immediately. However, they are back at zero point when they find the suspect murdered.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Beautiful Friendship
programme.desc: Atwater is settling into his new gig on intelligence as Antonio is relegated to desk duty while recovering. Lindsay finally realizes she has no way out and confides in Voight for help.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Call It Macaroni
programme.desc: Jin's murder investigation moves forward and Voight is under close watch by Internal Affairs, but is still in complete command of his unit.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Get My Cigarettes
programme.desc: Intelligence begins to look into a string of murders where the victims have a dollar bill pinned to their chests. Thanks to some digging by Ruzek, Voight learns this friend was involved in some shady business dealings.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Weigh Station
programme.desc: The bounty on Halstead's head becomes a serious reality as an innocent bartender takes a bullet meant for him. Olinsky tries to reason with Bembenek to call off the hit, while Voight and his team search for the hired assassin.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Chicken, Dynamite, Chainsaw
programme.desc: Two teenage girls have gone missing, and the team knows the clock is ticking to find them. Halstead, Antonio and Lindsay investigate a tenement that gives them a much needed lead. Voight brings the father of one of the girls in to get some honest answers.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: An Honest Woman
programme.desc: While trying to help out Olive, Voight is attacked and kidnapped. When he does not show up for work, the team gets suspicious and begins investigating. Ruzek and Atwater prove they do belong on the team when they find a lead.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Prison Ball
programme.desc: The team goes undercover in a prison to gather information on the murder of a young girl.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: They'll Have to Go Through Me
programme.desc: The final part of the crossover event finds our intelligence unit joined by detectives from the SVU to help solve the pedophile case. Ruzek and Amaro, along with Halstead and Antonio continue to hunt for the link to foster care and child trafficking.

programme.title: Movie: Addams Family Values
programme.desc: The Addams family tries to rescue Uncle Fester from his new, gold-digging love interest.

programme.title: Movie: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Dracula becomes overprotective of his daughter when a young boy falls for her.

programme.title: Movie: Hocus Pocus
programme.desc: In 1693 Salem, three sisters are executed for practicing witchcraft. Three hundred years later, a sceptic named Max explores the ruins of the legendary witches' house and dares the witches to manifest themselves.

programme.title: Movie: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: A vampire, who was imprisoned, comes to the aid of a dysfunctional family living in his ancestral home.

programme.desc: Gina gets her head stuck in their new brass headboard while making love to Martin.

programme.title: Martin: Swing Thing
programme.desc: The Paynes are invited to attend a Christmas party, given by some influential people.

programme.title: Martin: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: Gina and Pam witness a bank robbery and go into hiding.

programme.title: Martin: Green Card
programme.desc: Pam agrees to marry the building superintendent when he's threatened with deportation, but her help comes at a price.

programme.title: Martin: You're All I Need
programme.desc: When Martin flirts with a producer's wife, Gina becomes jealous and fights back.

programme.title: Martin: Kicked to the Curb
programme.desc: Martin and Gina end up homeless when their old apartment is sublet and the deal on the new one falls through . Desperate to recover their old place, they try to scare away the new tenants.

programme.title: Martin: The Best of Martin
programme.desc: Tisha Campbell hosts this clip show of the best of the last 99 episodes. Included are many of the special moments from the show, outtakes, and Tisha's own insight into the laughter behind the series.

programme.title: Martin: The Love Jones Connection
programme.desc: Sheneneh appears as a contestant on a dating game show and gets a lot more than a date.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Asses to Ashes
programme.desc: Judge Carl Robertson defeats Philip in the election for State Superior Court Judge.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Cold War
programme.desc: Vivian quarantines Will and Carlton in the backyard pool house when they both get colds.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Mommy Nearest
programme.desc: Will tries to tell his mother he does not want to return to Philadelphia after graduation.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Winner Takes Off
programme.desc: Geoffrey quits his job with the family after believing he won the big lottery.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Robbing the Banks
programme.desc: Valuable items begin to disappear after Will convinces Philip to hire a former convict.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Bundle of Joy
programme.desc: The family fantasizes about what their lives will be like after the baby is born.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: When Monique refuses to have sex until she's married, Will stages a mock wedding ceremony.

programme.title: Movie: Set It Off
programme.desc: Four women, from the Los Angeles projects, decide to beat the system by robbing banks.

programme.title: Movie: Barbershop: The Next Cut
programme.desc: Things are going well for Calvin, Eddie and the rest of the crew at Calvin's Barbershop, but their neighbourhood is taking a turn for the worse. With gang members roaming the streets, the crew needs to work together to save the shop and the community.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Wishes and Mistletoe Kisses
programme.desc: A woman is hired to decorate an estate building a few weeks before Christmas. While there, she works to break down the wall between her and the business owner, all while keeping the holiday spirit alive.

programme.title: Movie: Pride, Prejudice and Mistletoe
programme.desc: A career-driven woman finds her life turned upside down when she is forced to return to her hometown to care for her sick mother.

programme.title: Movie: A Shoe Addict's Christmas
programme.desc: A self-professed 'Christmas hater' is locked in a department store on Christmas Eve. There, she meets a woman who claims to be her 'guardian angel' and shares with her three Christmas ghosts.

programme.title: Movie: Coming Home for Christmas
programme.desc: While planning a final Christmas gala at the exquisite Ashford Estate, a house manager falls for the handsome executor of the estate.

programme.title: Movie: Marry Me at Christmas
programme.desc: A bridal boutique owner finds out she'll be working closely with her crush.

programme.title: Movie: A Bride for Christmas
programme.desc: A woman swears off marriage for good, until she truly falls in love, unaware she's been handpicked to help the man win a bet to prove he can get a woman to say 'yes' to his marriage proposal by Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: The Mistletoe Inn
programme.desc: An aspiring romance writer attends a writer's conference at a beautiful Vermont Inn where she meets another writer suffering from writer's block.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Land
programme.desc: When a woman inherits a Christmas tree farm from her late grandmother, she decides the sensible thing to do is sell it. However, once she revisits the farm, she falls in love with the townspeople and the farm.

programme.title: Movie: My Christmas Dream
programme.desc: A manager of a department store is determined to land a position in the new Paris location. She sets out to impress the store's owner by creating the best display in stores' history.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Christopher Knight and Callie Truelove to talk about the documentary, 'Truelove.' 'The Dude Diet Dinnertime' author, Serena Wolf, cooks Nashville hot chicken meatloaf minis.

programme.title: Movie: Looks Like Christmas
programme.desc: Two Type-A single parents battle it out for control of the Christmas holiday at their children's middle school, and they find they learn the meaning of Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas List
programme.desc: Planning a storybook Christmas with her boyfriend proves challenging for a woman when he goes AWOL. A tempting new romance turns her life upside down.

programme.title: Movie: A December Bride
programme.desc: An aspiring interior designer is dreading the wedding of her cousin, who is marrying her ex-fiancé. She accepts an offer to go with a friend, the one responsible for introducing the soon-to-be bride and groom.

programme.title: Movie: The Internship
programme.desc: Two salesmen manage to land internships with Google after their careers are destroyed by the digital world. Once inside, they face full on competitions, battling the world's top tech-savvy geniuses in an attempt to reinvent themselves and their careers.

programme.title: Movie: Step Brothers
programme.desc: When their parents fall in love and decide to marry, two spoiled, middle-aged men who still live at home, are forced to grow up.

programme.title: Movie: Wedding Crashers
programme.desc: Two womanizers sneak into weddings in order to take advantage of the romantic tinge in the air.

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Garrison's Fancy New Vagina

programme.title: South Park: Fat Butt and Pancake Head

programme.title: Movie: Will You Merry Me?
programme.desc: A couple wanting to marry must go through the anxiety-filled process of meeting the in-laws, as well as becoming immersed in future family holiday traditions.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Hope
programme.desc: Social worker Patricia Addison, whose marriage is on the rocks because of her son's death two years earlier, bends the rules and takes in a special 5-year-old over the holidays.

programme.title: Movie: Merry In-Laws
programme.desc: A woman says yes to her boyfriend's marriage proposal without knowing that her soon-to-be in-laws are Mr. And Mrs. Claus.

programme.title: Movie: On Strike for Christmas
programme.desc: A mother goes on strike when all of her efforts for a perfect family Christmas get taken for granted. Chaos ensues when she convinces all the other neighbourhood mothers to join in, and the strike takes on a life of its own when the local news finds out.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg to Stand On
programme.desc: Police investigate when a severed leg is found in the garbage. When they realize they can't use conventional techniques to catch the killer, police must use scientific techniques like DNA testing and toxicology reports to find him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Crystal Faye Todd was raped and murdered in her small town, one of her male acquaintances’ DNA matched semen at the crime scene. It raised the question, why would he volunteer for a DNA sample?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins
programme.desc: Faryion Wardrip seemed like the model citizen to most, but he was also a brutal serial killer who, for years, eluded police without suspicion. But smart police work and DNA from a discarded paper cup proved to be Wardrip's undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Reel Danger
programme.desc: When two young boys are viciously attacked while fishing in a nearby pond, authorities suspect a group of teenage thugs, but lack solid evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Cheater
programme.desc: Little did Walter Scott of the band 'Bob Kuban and the In-Men' know that their 1966 hit-single 'The Cheater' would foreshadow the events that would lead to his demise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Telltale Tracks
programme.desc: Police found an abandoned car on the highway and assumed the driver had been the victim of a car-jacking. When they find the victim's body, unusual marks on her body lead to her killer.

programme.title: The Dead Wives Club: The Carjacking
programme.desc: Charles Stuart called police with a desperate plea. He and his pregnant wife, Carol, had been attacked on their way home from a birthing class in Boston. As police rush to their aid, Stuart tells them they were carjacked, robbed, and shot.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: It's In Your Brain
programme.desc: Doctors and the CDC in Atlanta spent months trying to figure out what California honeymooners, a surfer in Hawaii and a toddler in Tennessee have in common.

programme.title: The Dead Wives Club: Natalie Wood
programme.desc: How could leading lady Natalie Wood disappear from a boat in the middle of the night without anyone on board noticing?

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: It's In Your Brain
programme.desc: Doctors and the CDC in Atlanta spent months trying to figure out what California honeymooners, a surfer in Hawaii and a toddler in Tennessee have in common.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Trace
programme.desc: The deaths of a child and a truck driver in the same hospital on the same day are investigated to see if there is a link between them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Knot for Everyone
programme.desc: In the mid-1980s, bodies of nude woman were found in remote hills of California. The police got a break when a known prostitute escaped an attacker and was able to identify him and his automobile. The suspect was 50-year-old Roger Kibbe.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Talking Skull
programme.desc: A mapmaker was surveying the grounds of a boy scout ranch when something caught his eye. At first, it appeared to be a turtle shell, but it proved to be a human skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: A serial bomber was waging a vendetta against the legal profession: A judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse had been targeted. Investigators used evidence from the bombs to lead them to the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Evidence
programme.desc: The shooting of a man during a hunting trip is reopened years after the incident, and the victim's hunting partner becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Formula
programme.desc: The mother of a suspiciously murdered four-month-old was convicted, but an explanation for the death would come five months later from the most unlikely of sources: his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Beaten by a Hair
programme.desc: Laura Houghteling left her Bethesda home and walked to the station to take a train to work. A peculiar strand of hair found in Laura's hairbrush enabled investigators to unravel the mystery of her disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crime Seen
programme.desc: After years in prison, Edward Honaker finally found someone who believed him, and was willing to pay for DNA testing which could prove he was innocent.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Speck of Evidence
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Bond
programme.desc: The story of nurse Tanya Reid who may have murdered her own baby and was planning to murder her son.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds
programme.desc: An oil tanker fire in a shipyard leads to massive explosions. A skier falls hundreds of feet down a mountain. A back draft explosion injures firefighters. A pilot crash-lands on an aircraft carrier, and a crane collapses, dropping its load onto a car.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds
programme.desc: A funny car catches on fire, crashes and disintegrates. A fire causes a university in Holland to collapse. A four-story wall of water crashes a windsurfer. During a church fire, a firefighter is nearly crushed.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Timber Busting Diamond T
programme.desc: Steve faces an uphill battle meeting his client's demands for a 1930s era truck before acquiring an old friend's family heirloom Diamond T; the work begins to transform a gutless work truck into a mountain-taming monster.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Water Rat
programme.desc: A family man with a need for speed brings a battered 50's era pickup to Steve looking for a bad ass rat rod the whole family can enjoy. To meet their client's demands the crew need to find a way to add glitz and gloss to a smoke belching monster.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Freakshow on Wheels
programme.desc: An enthusiastic cowboy is looking for a rat rod to lift the spirits of his small town. Steve quickly lands on the idea of making a death-defying carnival ride on wheels.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: American Muscle

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Electro Rod
programme.desc: When a client brings Steve a 1928 Buick filled with rotten wood, his excitement at rat-rodding an original 'gangster' car soon fades when he learns his client wants it to be an electric car.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Mack Rod
programme.desc: Guns and gators are on the menu when a Texan house mover brings Steve his family treasure: a 1938 Big Rig Mack Truck cab that's one step from the grave.

programme.title: Family Guy: Peternormal Activity

programme.title: Rick and Morty: Something Ricked This Way Comes

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Fawn Stars
programme.desc: In Liberty County, the death of a deer is investigated. Fawns in Harris County are being illegally kept as pets. Patrol on Somerville Lake leads to multiple citations. A suspicious car is stopped in Red River County.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Poachers Beware
programme.desc: A deer poacher is busted, a baby rattlesnake is rescued, a hummingbird evades capture, and a raccoon is released into the wild. The game wardens also respond to flooding conditions and a car accident.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Deadly Conduct

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bigger and Better: In Hot Water

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Calm After the Storm
programme.desc: Game Warden Eddins helps a neighbour in need. Reneau responds to a call about a baby red-tailed hawk. Game Warden Richards attempts to serve an arrest warrant. Game Warden Startz patrols solo on the Guadalupe River. Wardens monitor the Rio Grande.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Back in the Wild
programme.desc: Anglers are out all over Texas. In Houston County, a Game Warden returns after a life-threatening injury. Along the coast, fishermen get caught with too many sharks. A protected turtle gets relocated and anglers on the Gulf learn how to tag fish.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Wildcat Garage
programme.desc: Deer season is well underway across Texas. In East Texas, Game Wardens find a bobcat a new home and investigate an illegally killed deer. On the coast, the Texas Game Wardens deal with an outstanding warrant.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Search for a Super Croc

programme.title: Too Cute!: Fuzzy Polar Puppies
programme.desc: Nanook, a shy Chinook, is the only boy in a litter of four, training to be a sled dog; Rocky the Labradoodle and his brother Stanley grow up poolside; Rollo and Pickles are wiener dogs who aspire to be athletes like their mom, a champion hotdog.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Kitty Dearest
programme.desc: Travis and Diane share joint custody of Oscar, but she can't take his obnoxious behaviour anymore.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Lumpy Duck
programme.desc: Dr. Ross closely examines a duck with a lump in his throat. Dr. Lavigne uses x-ray film during surgery in a very unexpected way, while Dr. Blue tries to uncover a guinea pig mystery at the clinic. Dr. Lavigne's wife joins a local roller derby team.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: A Tiny Miracle
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff tackles surgery he's never done before to save a pit bull puppy that can't eat on his own. A young woman's cat is rushed to the clinic with a mysterious injury. Dr. Jeff treats a young Lab who has stopped eating.

programme.title: The Zoo: Moving Day
programme.desc: The Zoo's huge male sea lion is in rut, and staff need to move the younger males before he comes territorial. The veterinary team come up with an ingenious solution to repair Dinky the Flamingo's broken ankle. And feeding a rock python proves challenging.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Heating Up a Sun Bear Romance
programme.desc: Sun bears Toni and Milli are having relationship issues, with Toni being given the cold shoulder. Keepers hope that romance may once again flourish in a brand-new enclosure.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: The Dogs That Stole Our Hearts
programme.desc: Tia, her kids and the extended Villalobos family reveal the behind the scenes stories of the dogs that have stolen their hearts over the years.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Golden Girl
programme.desc: Mariah faces a challenging rescue when she realizes the dog in danger is deaf. Former adopters come back to Villalobos set on adopting a special needs dog. And the rescue struggles to track down a dog's owner because of outdated microchip information.

programme.title: River Monsters: The Mutilator
programme.desc: A mysterious creature is tearing chunks from unsuspecting fishermen, starting with their male genitalia as they bathe or fish in the tribal waters of the Sepik River in Papua, New Guinea.

programme.title: River Monsters: Atomic Assassin
programme.desc: An extreme angler is on the trail of a monster that leads him to the site of the worst nuclear accident in history, Chernobyl.

programme.title: Movie: All Eyez on Me
programme.desc: The true story of musician Tupac Shakur's life. Raised by activists, the young black man grew up to be a poet, actor and one of the world's most successful rappers whose impact has only grown since his death, turning him into a global cultural icon.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's The Oval: The Pilot

programme.desc: When Lynn tries to date Maya's neighbour Jalen, Maya realizes her true feelings for him.

programme.title: Martin: Back in Trouble Again

programme.title: Martin: Sophomore Jinx

programme.title: Martin: Working Girls
programme.desc: Pam and Gina fight for an advertisement account.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Real Wedding
programme.desc: Colonel and Edna ask the Brown family for help as they prepare for their wedding. Later, Renee expects something from Sasha after doing a good deed for him.

programme.title: Black-ish: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: After Dre notices that his neighbour Janine has never invited his family to any of her pool parties, he assumes she is racially stereotyping them as a family that doesn't swim. The kids are shocked to find out that, in fact, Dre doesn’t know how to swim.

programme.title: Black-ish: Twindependence
programme.desc: Jack and Diane are tired of being twins, and after much pleading, Dre and Bow give in to letting them explore their lives as individuals. Meanwhile, Dre buys Zoey her first car, and she is over the moon.

programme.desc: See how the '80s created our modern world including the revolution in personal entertainment brought on by Pac-Man and Sony Walkmans while a new kid on the block defined a new musical era - spelled 'MTV.'

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: The Revolutionaries
programme.desc: Reagan's business mandate leads to a new breed of entrepreneurs, including Steve Jobs, whose '1984' ad helped launch the Super Bowl commercial craze and Ted Turner, who invented the 24-hour news network.

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Shop 'Til You Drop
programme.desc: Glamour finds a new poster girl in the 1980s, when a young singer is launched to stardom with a shocking performance of 'Like a Virgin' at the first MTV Music Video Awards inspiring girls across the globe to hit the mall.

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Masters of the Universe
programme.desc: With the motto 'greed is good,' Gordon Gekko desires excess and ambition in 'Wall Street' while traders mirror his bad behaviour in real life. CEOs see their salaries rise while women fight to overcome office boys' clubs.

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Tear Down These Walls
programme.desc: Though the 1980s were known for its 'greed is good' mantra, the decade also saw its fair share of literal and cultural walls brought down, as Americans united on political, racial and health issues.

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Super Power
programme.desc: At the end of the 1980s American pop culture goes global and helps bring down the Iron Curtain, leaving America as the world's sole superpower.

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Lift Off
programme.desc: See how the '80s created our modern world including the revolution in personal entertainment brought on by Pac-Man and Sony Walkmans while a new kid on the block defined a new musical era - spelled 'MTV.'

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Tear Down These Walls
programme.desc: Though the 1980s were known for its 'greed is good' mantra, the decade also saw its fair share of literal and cultural walls brought down, as Americans united on political, racial and health issues.

programme.title: Inside North Korea's Dynasty: Kingdom of the Kims
programme.desc: For decades, Korea and its people labour under Japanese imperialist rule. In 1912, in a small town outside Pyongyang, a child is born - Kim Il Sung, coinciding with an omen of imperialism's doom.

programme.title: Inside North Korea's Dynasty: The Son of God
programme.desc: Unpacking the unique Kim father-son relationship further, 'Son of God' tracks the decline of Kim Il Sung and the rise of his son, Kim Jong Il.

programme.title: Inside North Korea's Dynasty: Nuclear Family
programme.desc: 'A Nuclear Family' begins as the Cold War ends — and North Korea has lost Soviet patronage, and with it, the security it guarantees and the economic support that has sustained the country for nearly half a century.

programme.title: Inside North Korea's Dynasty: Rocket Man
programme.desc: With the death of Kim Jong Il and the rise of the new leader of North Korea — his son, Kim Jong Un, taking power at the age of 28.

programme.title: The Story of Us With Morgan Freeman: Us and Them
programme.desc: Morgan Freeman investigates the forces of fear and intolerance that push us apart.

programme.title: Nazi Megastructures: Russia's War: Blitzkrieg in the East
programme.desc: The story of Hitler's invasion of Russia and the clash of arms at fortress Sevastopol.

programme.title: After Hitler: Spoils of War

programme.title: Eyewitness: D-Day
programme.desc: Five key turning points that changed the course of history during the D-Day landings.

programme.title: D-Day Sacrifice: The Landings
programme.desc: June 5, 1944. The biggest invasion fleet in history is about to take off for France, to free Europe from Nazi Germany's clutches. The Anglo-American Allies have recruited two million men, all ready to sacrifice their lives.

programme.title: D-Day Sacrifice: Battle of Normandy
programme.desc: June 6th, 1944. The Allies have secured the beaches. Although France and Paris remain occupied by the Germans, hope is revived. After thousands of casualties on both sides, Paris is liberated by the end of August.

programme.title: Nazi Underworld
programme.desc: Dig deeper into Adolf Hitler's inner circle to discover this dictator's identity beyond what is found in history books. Follow a list of characters that spans the full spectrum of German society.

programme.title: Dog: Impossible: Breaking Fear

programme.desc: Hercules the tortoise is critically ill, and Shakira the chicken has a limp.

programme.desc: These backyard pets are part of the family. A squirrel goes to the dentist and a rat gets some boots!

programme.title: Secrets of the Giant Manta Ray
programme.desc: Join us as we discover the mysteries of the iconic giant manta rays.

programme.title: Superfish: Bluefin Tuna
programme.desc: The legendary bluefin tuna is on a quest to remain one of a giant among fish.

programme.title: Mega Hammerhead
programme.desc: Dr. Neil Hammerschlag and his team of researchers are setting off on a quest to learn more about this mysterious shark, as well as search for the massive Great Hammerhead.

programme.title: Sharks of Lost Island
programme.desc: Dr. Enric Sala sets out on a journey to the Pitcairn islands to document life in the sea and on land with hopes of turning this potentially pristine ocean environment into a protected marine reserve.

programme.title: Tiger Shark Terror
programme.desc: Professional shark diver Eli Martinez and scientist Matthew Smukall plunge into the nighttime world of Tiger Beach to investigate whether shark behavior changes once the sun goes down.

programme.title: Lost Sharks of Easter Island
programme.desc: Shark expert Enric Sala and his team set out from Chile to the Southern Pacific Ocean. They first stop at Easter Island before diving underwater where they discover an ocean desert.

programme.title: Monster Fish: Alligator Gar
programme.desc: Dr. Zeb Hogan searches the swamps and bayous of the southern United States in search of the rapidly disappearing alligator gar - a monster fish that's known for its armoured scales and a mouthful of razor-sharp teeth.

programme.title: Monster Fish: Monsters of the Nile
programme.desc: Dr. Zeb Hogan travels to Lake Victoria and the Nile River in Uganda and comes face to face with one of the continent's largest species of freshwater fish, the Nile Perch, and investigates how this legendary 6 foot, 300 pound predator - is faring.

programme.title: Monster Fish: Giant Eels
programme.desc: The giant eel is a massive, flesh-eating, wall-climbing, air- absorbing, snakelike fish that can attack like a crocodile and live upwards of 100 years. So, of course, Zeb goes in search of two of the largest species.

programme.title: Monster Fish: 40,000 Pound Shark
programme.desc: In Mexico, Zeb uncovers the truth behind a mysterious swarm of sharks.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the Seventh Wonder
programme.desc: The Lighthouse of Alexandria is one of the world's original Seven Wonders, but it could have been home to a mysterious superweapon, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate the secrets of this fabled death ray and its long-lost home.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hidden City of the Incas
programme.desc: The lost city of Machu Picchu is one of the greatest mysteries in archaeology. Scientists do not know why this city in the clouds was built, but investigations into secret Inca codes and deformed skeletons might finally reveal its ultimate mystery.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost Pyramid of the Americas
programme.desc: At an ancient city lost in the desert for 5,000 years, experts uncover evidence of human sacrifice and strange rituals, and new discoveries reveal that the people who lived here might have been the first civilization of the Americas.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Illuminati Conspiracy
programme.desc: New discoveries are revealing the dark truths behind the secret societies said to rule the world, and using cutting-edge science, experts investigate if the ties between these groups and the most infamous conspiracies in history.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Kingdom of the Vanished
programme.desc: A mysterious town in the hills of South Africa was once a booming community, but today, the eerie place is deserted. Experts reveal the cataclysm that caused the people of this once-prosperous town to suddenly leave and never come back.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secret of Supervillain Island
programme.desc: On a strange island off the coast of Croatia, the mysterious ruins of a long-abandoned hideout look like they once belonged to a James Bond supervillain, and new discoveries reveal why it was built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret Societies: Mystery and Conspiracy
programme.desc: Experts investigate if there's any truth to conspiracy theories that allege secret societies control the course of world history from behind-the scenes, and if true, new discoveries might finally reveal the extent of their global domination.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Kingdom of the Vanished
programme.desc: A mysterious town in the hills of South Africa was once a booming community, but today, the eerie place is deserted. Experts reveal the cataclysm that caused the people of this once-prosperous town to suddenly leave and never come back.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secret of Supervillain Island
programme.desc: On a strange island off the coast of Croatia, the mysterious ruins of a long-abandoned hideout look like they once belonged to a James Bond supervillain, and new discoveries reveal why it was built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Secrets of the Illuminati
programme.desc: Discover the secrets of the mysterious group known as 'The Illuminati,' and where they operate from. Find out if they are really some secret world government operating in the shadows, or if they're just one huge conspiracy.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: We reveal the remarkable story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Forbidden History: In Search of King Arthur
programme.desc: The legend of King Arthur is one of a courageous fighter and leader in battle, but for centuries, the fabled king has been a mystery to historians. Find out if his story of Camelot, Excalibur and Guinevere just an elaborate fairytale.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret History of James Bond
programme.desc: James Bond is one of the famous characters in history, and new discoveries reveal there might be a secret truth behind this world-famous figure. Experts team up with a former spy to separate fact from fiction and reveal the secrets of modern espionage.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Ghosts of the Berlin Wall
programme.desc: Experts explore the mysterious abandoned ruins that were once behind the Berlin Wall, and these new investigations turn up discoveries that reveal the dark truths of East Germany and its terrifying secret police.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Dead Sea Scrolls Conspiracy
programme.desc: Experts investigated the Dead Sea Scrolls, which have been kept top-secret for decades by the Vatican. These could reveal the location of tunnel holding billions of dollars of treasure.

programme.title: Lost Beasts of the Ice Age
programme.desc: New discoveries in a mysterious Siberian cave could bring woolly mammoths and other long-dead Ice Age beasts back to life, and using the latest tech, experts race to unearth precious DNA from their mummified remains in a cutting-edge cloning experiment.

programme.title: How the Earth Works: Japanese Death Match
programme.desc: Liz and Martin visit Japan, to witness the battle that rages between the people and the land they live on. But how much of a threat do Japan's volcanoes, earthquakes and tsunamis pose?

programme.title: How the Earth Works: Can Krakatoa Stop Time?
programme.desc: An active volcano with the power to plunge the whole world into a brutal dark age is rising from the sea in the heart of the Asia. It's done it before, and it will erupt again.

programme.title: How the Earth Works: Asteroid Armageddon
programme.desc: Martin and Liz investigate a giant asteroid impact that may have wiped out the dinosaurs 65 million years ago. Martin experiences the power of a NASA supergun, and Liz follows the geological clues to Mexico where she dives an underground river.

programme.title: How the Earth Works: Will Iceland Poison the Skies?
programme.desc: Martin and Liz explore Iceland to see if its volcanoes could spread global chaos in the future. Martin samples an insane motorsport on ashy slopes, and Liz has the dive of a lifetime between the continental plates of North America and Europe.

programme.title: How the Earth Works: Will Hawaii Sink L.A.?
programme.desc: Liz and Martin travel to the tropical paradise of Hawaii to investigate how evidence of catastrophic events in its geological past reveal a pattern of destruction that stretches back millions of years.

programme.title: How the Earth Works: The Rockies Built the Atom Bomb
programme.desc: Geologist, Martin Pepper, and biologist, Liz Bonnin, travel to the iconic Rocky Mountains, to reveal the extraordinary link between the Rockies' soaring peaks and the uranium that ended up in 'Little Boy', the atomic bomb detonated over the Japanese city.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Saturday Night
programme.desc: A deliveryman has his car stolen at gunpoint, and the unit uses a decoy vehicle to try to catch the suspects. The Unit changes their schedule to catch the thieves off guard.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: These Are the Streets
programme.desc: Stolen jeep followed; individuals are captured and a gun is recovered.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Moving Target
programme.desc: Deputy Mendez and the Fugitive Task Force search for a career criminal before another victim is robbed, assaulted, or worse.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Couple on the Run
programme.desc: After a drug deal goes wrong, a man is shot and collapses behind a dumpster, ending up on life support. A couple are wanted in connection to this attempted murder.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Gun Store Heist
programme.desc: In Virginia Beach, Virginia, almost 30 handguns were stolen after thieves broke through the roof of a gun store. Detectives try to secure the firearms before the thieves have time to sell the guns on the streets.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: On the Stroll
programme.desc: Task Force is looking for a woman promoting prostitution of young children.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Just Wanted My Burger
programme.desc: The A.T.T.F. is on the prowl in Newark, New Jersey and they have plenty to keep them busy. First they get a work out when a perp takes off running, later they recover a stolen tractor trailer and a stolen car at a drive-thru window.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: It's Job Security
programme.desc: Task force patrols the streets at night incognito to track down unsuspecting thieves.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: It's the Brick Bandit!
programme.desc: The Task Force chases the 'Brick bandit' who leaves bricks in the car he steals. An officer has to take down a suspect by himself during a tense night.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: They're Hitting the Highway
programme.desc: A stolen vehicle is found abandoned, rolling backwards down the street.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Roxanne's First Fugitive
programme.desc: Detective Roxanne Lopez has two conflicting tips about where a sexual offender may be.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Hot and Cold
programme.desc: Officers nab a parole violator who raped a nine-year old and search for a fugitive wanted for violating parole on a manslaughter conviction.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Scarred for Life
programme.desc: Detectives hunt down a dangerous woman on the run after she slashed a former friend in the face with a box cutter.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Catch Me If You Can
programme.desc: Tommy and his team are back on the trail of a dangerous fugitive who was convicted for armed robbery and assault, and was deported over ten years ago.

programme.title: American Justice: Crime of Passion: The Pamela Smart Story
programme.desc: Pamela Smart seduced her 15-year-old lover into killing her husband.

programme.title: American Justice: Blood on the Staircase
programme.desc: North Carolina author Michael Peterson was convicted of murdering his wife for her insurance money.

programme.title: Nightwatch Nation: Back from the Brink
programme.desc: Baton Rouge paramedics rush to the aid of a man attacked by his girlfriend with a box-cutter knife. Gunshots fired in Yonkers send Ariel and Cunningham to save a man down. In Austin, first responders plead with a patient to go to the hospital.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Dreams and Nightmares
programme.desc: The first responders deal with a rash of scary calls, including a man suffering from amnesia after getting hit by a car and a woman who fell off a roof.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: It's a tense situation as Sgt. Paul Hamilton and his squad get caught up in a high-speed car chase to bring down a suspected auto theft ring. Later, Paul's squad joins Huth's to double their efforts and hit two houses at once.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Sergeant Chip Huth and his team head out to serve a drug warrant on an alleged mid-level drug dealer. When the warrant takes turns into a lead-slinging barricade, the SWAT team is left dodging bullets and running for cover.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: The war on drugs continues as Sergeants Chip Huth and Paul Hamilton combine their squads to take down a meth lab. After suiting up in high-tech protective gear and heading into the potentially deadly situations, things get tense.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: A car used to rob a large cache of assault rifles is found parked outside a house in a Dallas suburb; a sniper must call out a possibly armed and dangerous suspect from his home; but when a young boy comes out, all strategies must be changed.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: Sr. Corporal Steve Claggett and other SWAT members practice their explosive breaching skills. Then, Steve rushes to the scene of an armed barricade where two suspects have allegedly robbed a convenience store.

programme.title: American Monster: Home Video Hit
programme.desc: A typical American family isn't exactly what it seems. In public, Max and Janeene Jones appear to have the perfect marriage, but behind this happy image lies hidden truths. 20 years later, an undercover police investigation reveals an unexpected killer.

programme.title: American Monster: Live by the Sword
programme.desc: Outside Los Angeles, sword collector Neal Williams is the house-husband while his wife Manling keeps the family afloat. It's a tough but happy life, as their home videos attest. Until Manling returns home to find her family slaughtered - at sword point.

programme.title: American Monster: The Green Monster
programme.desc: In rural Ohio, an intruder brutally guns down Jack and Linda Myers in their sleep. The only witness is their sleepy 4-year-old grandson. But their extensive home movies - aired here for the first time - may have captured a monster lurking in their midst.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: In July of 2006, 22 year-old Tori Vienneau and her 10 month-old son, Dean, are both found strangled in their home. As San Diego Police delve into Tori's life, they uncover a complicated romance, a startling revelation, and evidence to make an arrest.

programme.title: American Monster: Edge of Reason
programme.desc: Todd and Rachel Winkler's life looks exquisite from the outside, but inside things are falling apart. Seen on video, their happy marriage hides the terrible secrets and mind-games that can only lead to one conclusion.

programme.title: A Killer Trick-or-Treater
programme.desc: Doreen and Charles Erbert live a charmed life with their four-year-old daughter Deanna in San Jose, California. But everything comes to a violent end on Halloween night when Doreen is stabbed to death by a masked trick-or-treater.

programme.title: American Monster: Remote Control
programme.desc: When Sherri Dally mysteriously vanishes from her Ventura home, her husband Michael and best friend Debbie head up a massive search. But someone knows more than they're saying. Never-before-aired home videos trace a tale of sordid secrets and double lives.

programme.title: American Monster: Edge of Reason
programme.desc: Todd and Rachel Winkler's life looks exquisite from the outside, but inside things are falling apart. Seen on video, their happy marriage hides the terrible secrets and mind-games that can only lead to one conclusion.

programme.title: A Killer Trick-or-Treater
programme.desc: Doreen and Charles Erbert live a charmed life with their four-year-old daughter Deanna in San Jose, California. But everything comes to a violent end on Halloween night when Doreen is stabbed to death by a masked trick-or-treater.

programme.title: American Monster: Remote Control
programme.desc: When Sherri Dally mysteriously vanishes from her Ventura home, her husband Michael and best friend Debbie head up a massive search. But someone knows more than they're saying. Never-before-aired home videos trace a tale of sordid secrets and double lives.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: In July of 2006, 22 year-old Tori Vienneau and her 10 month-old son, Dean, are both found strangled in their home. As San Diego Police delve into Tori's life, they uncover a complicated romance, a startling revelation, and evidence to make an arrest.

programme.title: Dateline: The Stranger
programme.desc: She vanished into thin air. Who might have played a role in the mysterious disappearance of Brittany Tavar? There was a handsome boarder and the friend turned enemy or did the free spirit just up and leave on her own?

programme.title: Dateline: Lost in Sin City
programme.desc: A small town girl moved to the big city of Las Vegas, where she found a new career and a new love. But then she vanished. Within days, police found her body. But finding who killed her would be a tougher mystery to crack.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Ultimate Betrayal
programme.desc: Parents return home from a trip to find blood everywhere, signs of struggle and their teenage daughter missing. Police combing the desert for her stumble on her charred remains digital clues soon lead them to a shocking secret and a deadly betrayal.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: A Secret Life
programme.desc: When 18-year old Brittany Clardy starts dating an older man, her life veers from model student to lost soul. And when the teenager disappears, her family panics. Now, investigators must unravel her complicated life filled with secrets and regret.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Death on the Highway
programme.desc: 28-year-old Michael Sandy is an interior designer living in Williamsburg, Brooklyn. Michael loves music and making new friends on the internet. But in 2006, Michael's habit of trusting strangers he meets on the web will put his life in jeopardy.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Dangerous Liason
programme.desc: An outspoken actress grabs the attention of a powerful and dangerous drug lord. Then, in hiding, he reaches out to say he wants to meet; he will give her the rights to his story. It's the opportunity of a lifetime. But is the risk greater than the reward?

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Stranger Than Fiction
programme.desc: When Vallejo, California resident Aaron Quinn reported that kidnappers broke into his home, abducted his girlfriend Denise Huskins, and demanded a ransom, their story garnered national attention.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Manhunt
programme.desc: This real life prison break captivated the nation last month and kept a small upstate New York town on edge for three weeks until convicted murderers Richard Matt was shot and killed and David Sweat was shot and captured.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Snitch
programme.desc: Officers discover the body of a young man they know all too well -- police informant Jimmie Stevenson. But Jimmy's loose lips made him a potential target for a laundry list of killers, and it's up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine who pulled the trigger.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Bad Things Come in Threes
programme.desc: When two young mothers are gunned down behind a crowded bar, Kenda has to first determine who was the intended target. But the case takes a bizarre turn when he learns of a third young woman who was recently murdered under eerily similar circumstances.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Blood Innocence
programme.desc: A war hero is beaten to death for no apparent reason. The crime scene offers few clues, but Lt Joe Kenda notices an unusual pattern in the victim's head wounds and enlists a team of engineers to help him identify the murder weapon and crack the case.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Who Took Heather?
programme.desc: A 13-year-old girl is missing, sending Kenda's city into a panic. Who is responsible? Just when investigators think they've got a handle on what is going on, a cryptic letter to the District Attorney's office suggests the girl isn't the only victim.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Sound of Silence
programme.desc: Gallaudet University is America's premier college for the deaf, but this haven for higher learning is turned upside down when two students are murdered in their dorm rooms. Investigators dive into campus life and reveal a serial killer in the making.

programme.title: Hitler and the Aryan Myth
programme.desc: A laughable pseudo-history dreamt up by occult fantasists lay behind the myth of the Aryan super race. Yet it inspired the Nazis into war, legitimized the holocaust and led to the abduction of tens of thousands of young Aryan-looking children.

programme.title: Hitler's Death Ray
programme.desc: 5,100 miles from the Earth a solar death ray can be found orbiting the skies. At the thrust of rocket, this solar mirror will obliterate any city. This was the Nazi dream, see the reality.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Commander in Chief: Inside the Oval Office: Kennedy and the Cuban Missile Crisis
programme.desc: For thirteen days in October 1962, the US and the Soviet Union stood on the brink of nuclear war. See how John F. Kennedy resisted the forces pushing him towards war and how he saved the world from total destruction.

programme.title: Commander in Chief: Inside the Oval Office: The Bin Laden Raid
programme.desc: Osama bin Laden targets the innocent with a campaign of terror. When CIA operatives track bin Laden down to a mysterious compound, it's up to President Barack Obama to make the tough call. But it won't be easy; his war cabinet is sharply divided.

programme.title: Commander in Chief: Inside the Oval Office: The Gulf War
programme.desc: When Kuwait is invaded in 1990, a President must make the tough call on a response. President George H.W. Bush's unique combination of skills as diplomat, spy, and politician are brought to bear on the first modern war in the post Cold War world.

programme.title: Commander in Chief: Inside the Oval Office: Kennedy and the Cuban Missile Crisis
programme.desc: For thirteen days in October 1962, the US and the Soviet Union stood on the brink of nuclear war. See how John F. Kennedy resisted the forces pushing him towards war and how he saved the world from total destruction.

programme.title: Commander in Chief: Inside the Oval Office: The Bin Laden Raid
programme.desc: Osama bin Laden targets the innocent with a campaign of terror. When CIA operatives track bin Laden down to a mysterious compound, it's up to President Barack Obama to make the tough call. But it won't be easy; his war cabinet is sharply divided.

programme.title: Commander in Chief: Inside the Oval Office: The Gulf War
programme.desc: When Kuwait is invaded in 1990, a President must make the tough call on a response. President George H.W. Bush's unique combination of skills as diplomat, spy, and politician are brought to bear on the first modern war in the post Cold War world.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Deadly Phantom Coup
programme.desc: The CIA use psychological warfare in Guatemala, 1954, as part of the coup d'état which changed history. In a top-secret operation using covert radio broadcasts to create a 'phantom' army, combined with a guerilla invasion trained by a top agents.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Killing 'Mad Dog' Gaddafi
programme.desc: In 2011 Libyan dictator Muammar Gaddafi was overthrown in a bloody civil war. What few people know is that the CIA had been planning to orchestrate a Libyan revolt for 30 years and that the man leading the rebel forces was a long-time CIA ally.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Head Quarters
programme.desc: Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich
programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: Warriors on the Frontlines
programme.desc: During the Vietnam War, Drew Dix and a small handful of soldiers liberate an entire city from an enemy battalion. Russian soldier Viktor Leonov vanquishes German forces in the Arctic battlegrounds of World War 2.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: For a Greater Cause
programme.desc: George Rowe is a former criminal who goes undercover to bust a motorcycle gang, and the Masin brothers lead a resistance cell against Communist oppression in Czechoslovakia.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Hell in the Pacific
programme.desc: The brave men and woman who fought along the tides of the Pacific share their stories. Both Japanese and U.S. forces face off with an intense determination and will to survive.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Drive-Through Corn Crib
programme.desc: Mark and the guys use over 100 antique logs from two tobacco barns to build a dramatic entrance for their client's property. The drive-through double corn crib requires a whole lot of teamwork.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Turning a Ramshackle Cabin Into a Guest House In Missouri
programme.desc: The guys take down and rebuild a historic 170-year-old cabin. Sherman leads the guys in converting this cabin into a guest house for kindred spirit client, Mark Perry.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Rocky Mountain Cabin
programme.desc: The team brings an Appalachian-style cabin all the way to western Colorado.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Family Is a Good Thing
programme.desc: The Hills race to finish installing their floor to avoid a delivery delay, which leads to an on-site injury. Meanwhile, Jackie and her team run into problems when their build materials start to fall apart.

programme.title: Building Alaska: This Is the Sketchy Part
programme.desc: The Hills work on their first floor framing, but work slows to a stop when their tools begin to freeze. The Owens work on installing the second story gables, while Jackie and her team work to finish the cabin's roof structure.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Knock This Thing Out
programme.desc: As winter barrels down on Alaska, the builders scramble to complete their heating systems. Chappie must climb an extremely tall ladder to cut a hole in his roof while Jeff and his friend Andy build a hearth and Chris fixes a leak in his chimney.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Sky's the Limit
programme.desc: As the final days of their builds approach, the builders work to complete their cabins. Jeff Erickson helicopters in the remaining furniture for his cabin, and Chris Sewell's team works hard through the night to get the interior floors installed.

programme.desc: Brock and Chase gut a lakeside retro guesthouse and give it a floor-to-ceiling rustic overhaul. They replace laminate flooring with wood, make a custom live-edge kitchen island and add a custom door frame to the main room.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Holmes Sweet Home
programme.desc: Emotions are high as MJ delivers his custom table to an unsuspecting friend. Then, after months in the making, it's all Holmes on deck as everyone pitches in for the final push to complete the house before the big reveal.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Families Helping Families
programme.desc: Mike is going back to his roots and helping families, along with his kids, Michael and Sherry. At a home they dub The City Barn, they plan to fix the weathered roof and make the property more accessible for a 13-year-old who is battling cancer.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Divide and Conquer
programme.desc: Structural issues at their two clients' houses means Mike and Michael must split up and tackle the jobs separately. Michael takes on the roof and other problems at The City Barn, while Mike uncovers unsettling complications.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Not a Dry Eye in the House
programme.desc: The Flood House is close to completion and the showpiece gas fireplace with a custom mantel brings one of the homeowners to tears. Over at The City Barn, more structural issues arise, creating greater challenges than Mike and the team expected.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Can You Dig It?
programme.desc: Mike and the team start on a third project and declare it 'The Toxic Townhouse' after a home inspection uncovers terrible toxic elements and a dangerous pipe issue. Then, the team makes another disturbing discovery at The City Barn.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Holmes Stretch
programme.desc: The first property that Mike Holmes and his son, MJ, bought is the last to be finished. Time is money, and there's still a ton of work to be done before they can put the sign up on the lawn.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Shaky Ground
programme.desc: Three new build teams arrive to their build sites and begin work on their unique cabins in the remote Alaskan wilderness. Josh Tousignant and his crew make the long trip to Cordova to begin building the foundation for their clients' two-story cabin.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Anything Can Go Wrong
programme.desc: At Trinity Lake, Chris and Joe battle an 80-foot spruce that begins to fall too soon before a helicopter delivery almost goes wrong. John and Heather fall behind while building the floor of their cabin due to the rain and need to get back to schedule.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Moving on to Plan X-Ray
programme.desc: Josh and his team begin work on the interior walls and install the second-story floor joists in their Cordova cabin. At Trinity Lake, Chris must adapt when he runs out of lumber to build a dock and the framers he hired don't show up.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Up High Without a Net
programme.desc: Chris Maynard and team prepare for two intense helicopter deliveries of roof rafters and Greg precariously scales a raised rake wall to nail it into place. John and Heather are finishing the roof by installing insulation and metal sheeting.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Rainbow Confection
programme.desc: Noah Cappe lands at the LA County Fair in Pomona, Calif. for some sunny west coast eats, like the jackfruit torta, PB meatballs and cherry candy-coated cherry punch hot wings. Finally, Noah takes a tasty stroll through the rainbow Ice Cream Garden.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: 50 Shades of Crepe
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Vancouver to sample some amazing eats, like the truly Canadian poutine stuffed burger, shrimp fried rice Balls, jerk chicken dumplings, and the Donuccino, a meal and a milkshake all in one.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Piefidelity
programme.desc: Noah Cappe knows where to find amazing fresh seafood at the Delaware State Fair in Harrington.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Good, the Bacon, the Ugly
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads for the Lone Star state to eat his way through the Texas State Fair in Dallas, featuring some inventive foods like the bacon-tilla and the indulgent masterpiece of chicken fried lobster.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The French Toast Connection
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the San Diego County fair in California, for breakfast with a bang, indulging in French toast bacon bombs.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Million Dollar Baby Cakes
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the annual Rio Rancho Pork and Brew festival in New Mexico.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Manila
programme.desc: Andrew reveals Manila's iconic foods, from slow roasted pork to chicken inasal.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Ooey Gooey Greatness

programme.title: Food Paradise: Easy as Pie
programme.desc: From an entire Thanksgiving dinner stuffed into a pie to the Texas-sized Pumpecapple, these friendly shops across America are finding many ways to fill a pie crust.

programme.desc: Bobby and Nikki travel to St. Augustine, Florida to discover and taste the famous Jalapeno Popper Burger at Gas Full Service restaurant.

programme.title: Junk Food Flip: The Unidentified Flipping Object

programme.title: Junk Food Flip: The Drunken Cubano Flip
programme.desc: It's a junk food journey down South to Bobby's home state of Georgia, to take on a legendary BBQ sandwich called 'the Drunken Cubano' at Southern Soul Barbeque in St. Simons Island.

programme.title: Junk Food Flip: The French Toast Frankie Flip
programme.desc: The 'French Toast Frankie' contains roughly 80% of the USDA's recommendation for daily calorie intake, 'Perfectly Franks' owner Perry Cuda couldn't be prouder of that fact.

programme.title: Junk Food Flip: The Southern Comfort Flip
programme.desc: When it comes to seafood in the South, no one does it better than Roadside Seafood in Charleston, South Carolina.

programme.title: Junk Food Flip: The Founder's Favorite Flip
programme.desc: The guys at Bruxie have reinvented the sandwich, using a thin Belgian waffle as the bread.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Bloody Bite Size Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby's small-plates-inspired menu will make sure his each of his guests gets a taste of something delicious. Bobby starts with crispy bacon and hash brown quesadillas with fried quail eggs.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Brunch Americain
programme.desc: Bobby Flay takes some All-American dishes and gives them a makeover for brunch.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Buon Appetito
programme.desc: Bobby fondly reminisces about his time spent in Italy as he comes up with an amazing brunch menu inspired by the flavors and food of the Italian Countryside.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Bay City Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby's San Francisco-inspired brunch includes apricot-yogurt parfait.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Slumber Party
programme.desc: When Bobby's daughter Sophie has a sleepover it can only mean one thing... dad's in the kitchen cooking up brunch for everyone! This fun and tasty menu starts with an apple pie oatmeal with bruleed crust that's sure to wake up your taste buds.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Chocolate Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby is making a brunch that features chocolate as a star ingredient. Dishes include double chocolate pancakes with salted caramel syrup and mole rubbed steak and eggs with chocolate stout beurre blanc.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Chocolate Lovers Delight
programme.desc: Bobby puts together a decadent brunch based entirely around chocolate.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Chocoholic Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay is covering the kitchen in chocolate for a luscious menu of sweet and savory treats like dark chocolate waffles with white chocolate custard sauce and espresso-chocolate whipped cream.

programme.title: Good Eats: Right on Q
programme.desc: Join Alton Brown for a journey into the world of home-made, tasty, smoked, pork.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Strawberry to Silver Dollar
programme.desc: The Brandywine Strawberry Festival in Pennsylvania is home to 'The Colossalo,' a crab cake/roast beef combo that has host Noah Cappe going wild. Other favourites include The Sizzler, the chicken parm'wich and strawberry kettle corn.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Golden State to Gizzards
programme.desc: Beginning in California and ending in Michigan, Noah Cappe explores creative carnival eats like the jalapeno cheese skirt burger and deep fried gizzards.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Michigan to Maize
programme.desc: Noah gets busy with the" Soul on a Roll" sandwich, and the "To Die For" casserole. Salted caramel apple gelato is the thing to beat the heat.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Cornfields to Canada

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man: Web Warriors: The Spider-Verse: Part Three

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man: Web Warriors: The Spider-Verse: Part Four

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Five: 1980-1989
programme.desc: The 1980s begin with Herschel Walker leading Georgia to a national title as a freshman. After Bear Bryant retires in 1982 and passes away four weeks later, control of the SEC is eventually transferred to Pat Dye and Bo Jackson at Auburn.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Six: 1990-1999
programme.desc: The 1990s bring change with expansion and the sports' first-ever conference championship game. Florida's Steve Spurrier fashions an era of high-octane offense, and his Gators form a rivalry with Tennessee and quarterback Peyton Manning.

programme.desc: Analysts discuss the latest news and upcoming events in the SEC.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Herschel Walker
programme.desc: Herschel Walker's career in the SEC was legendary, but his journey off the field was filled with struggle, pain, and ultimately, redemption.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Six Degrees of Graduation

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Where There's a Will There's a Way
programme.desc: Will and Carlton begin their first year at college by moving into their own apartment.

programme.title: Love and Hip Hop Hollywood: Picture Perfect
programme.desc: Fizz and Apryl are the talk of the town as Zell spreads word about catching them together in bed. Princess is furious with Ray for going to Vegas and reveals a long-hidden secret. Yoyo throws her daughter a baby shower.

programme.title: Love and Hip Hop Hollywood: Paparazzi
programme.desc: Zell exposes Fizz and Apryl's relationship, and the heat is on when Moniece comes face to face with the happy couple. Teairra Mari is back on the scene and her friends are concerned after her DUI. Princess struggles to forgive Ray.

programme.title: Movie: A December Bride
programme.desc: An aspiring interior designer is dreading the wedding of her cousin, who is marrying her ex-fiancé. She accepts an offer to go with a friend, the one responsible for introducing the soon-to-be bride and groom.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Cottage
programme.desc: An interior designer is made-of-honour at her friend’s wedding. Before the big day, she ends up stranded in the Christmas Cottage, where rumour has it, all guests will find everlasting love, with the brother of the bride.

programme.title: Movie: A Crown for Christmas
programme.desc: After getting fired from her job at a ritzy NYC hotel, a woman accepts a job as a governess to a young girl. She finds herself attracted to the girl’s father, who is king of the country, and love reigns over the kingdom.

programme.title: Movie: Let It Snow
programme.desc: When a resort executive is sent to a newly purchased lodge in Maine with instructions to turn it into an ultra-modern resort, she finds a charming, successful lodge loaded with holiday spirit and makes a connection with the owner's handsome son.

programme.title: Movie: It's Christmas, Eve
programme.desc: A school superintendent is forced to make cutbacks during the holiday season. A chance encounter leads her to meet a man and his young daughter, which leads to an unexpected romance, and a new song for her repertoire.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Cookies
programme.desc: A small-town factory, Aunt Sally's Christmas Cookie Company, is sold to large conglomerate. Their executive must seal the deal and shut down the factory, the town's lifeblood, but things become complicated when she meets the new owner.

programme.title: Movie: Naughty or Nice
programme.desc: A young woman receives a mysterious package at her door, which contains a 'Naughty or Nice' book that reveals the good and bad about everyone in her life.

programme.title: Movie: Love You Like Christmas
programme.desc: A high-powered marketing executive on her way to a wedding is derailed by car trouble. A fork in the road leads her to Christmas Valley, and her unexpected journey leaves her wondering what her life has been missing.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Next Door
programme.desc: The author of bachelor lifestyle books, is left in charge of his young niece and nephew for the holidays.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actor Michael Fishman from 'The Conners' visits. 'Just Feel' author, Mallika Chopra, stops by. Plus, 'What's Gaby Cooking' author, Gaby Dalkin, makes chocolate chip pumpkin bread.

programme.title: Movie: My Christmas Love
programme.desc: A hopeless romantic who can't seem to give a guy a real chance begins receiving '12 Days of Christmas' gifts anonymously at door. She begins to believe that the mystery suitor could live up to her expectations.

programme.title: Movie: Jingle Around the Clock
programme.desc: A woman plans a Christmas to remember with her college friends, only to be thwarted by an opportunity she can't pass up. Much to her surprise, she is forced to team up with a man who has a completely different view of what Christmas really means.

programme.title: Movie: Enchanted Christmas
programme.desc: An interior designer returns to Utah to spearhead a hotel renovation for the annual Christmas Eve show run by her former boyfriend. When she steps in to dance in the show's finale with him, she is torn between her job, family and feelings.

programme.title: South Park: Chef Aid
programme.desc: A record company steals Chef's song 'Stinky Britches' and he sues them for the rights. When Johnny Cochrane defends the record company, Chef is left penniless. But he has some very famous and talented friends who want to help their old mentor.

programme.title: The Office: Baby Shower
programme.desc: Michael practices for the birth of Jan's baby by having Dwight go over possible birthing scenarios. Meanwhile, Michael tells Holly that he will pretend to dislike her for Jan's benefit.

programme.title: The Office: Crime Aid
programme.desc: Michael helps Pam get a part time job at corporate so she can afford to go to art school. After the office gets robbed, Michael decides to hold an auction to raise money for all the items lost.

programme.title: The Office: Customer Survey
programme.desc: Dwight and Jim are shocked when they get the results of the annual customer survey report. Pam and Jim decide they want to spend every minute together using their Bluetooth phones. Meanwhile Angela and Andy pick a location for their wedding.

programme.title: The Office: Business Trip
programme.desc: Michael is ecstatic when David Wallace decides to send him on a business trip to Canada. Andy and Oscar become unlikely friends when Michael decides to bring them along. Meanwhile Jim counts down the days until Pam gets back from art school.

programme.title: The Office: Frame Toby
programme.desc: A mysterious person in the office has made a huge mess in the microwave and will not clean it up. Meanwhile, Michael has to come to terms with the fact that there have been certain personnel changes in his staff without his knowing.

programme.title: The Office: Halloween
programme.desc: Corporate forces Michael to fire someone, putting a damper on the Halloween festivities at Dunder-Mifflin. Jim and Pam put Dwight's resume on job-searching websites, and Jim considers applying for a better job.

programme.title: The Office: Business School
programme.desc: Ryan invites Michael to be a guest speaker at his business school. Meanwhile, Dwight battles a bat that gets loose in the office while Pam invites co-workers to her first art show.

programme.title: The Office: Employee Transfer

programme.title: The Office: Andy's Play
programme.desc: Andy invites the entire office to his production of Sweeney Todd, in the hopes that Erin will attend. Michael tries to put his jealousy aside and enjoy the performance, while Jim and Pam struggle with their terrible babysitter.

programme.title: The Office: Costume Contest
programme.desc: Michael freaks out when Darryl takes an idea to corporate over his head. Everyone in the office is in a competitive mood when the costume contest gets underway.

programme.title: The Office: Spooked
programme.desc: Erin struggles to make the office party exactly how Andy and Robert would want it. Jim and Pam argue about whether or not ghosts are real.

programme.desc: When their trailer catches fire, the young husband heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home. The cut window screen points to an intruder, but there is a lack of evidence.
