programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Not So Sweet Sixteen
programme.desc: Savannah is turning sweet 16, and a big birthday bash is in the works. Todd has to come to grips with the fact that his little girl is growing into a young woman. At the party, Todd keeps a watchful eye on girl-crazy Chase.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Jugs and Ammo
programme.desc: Todd’s eldest daughter Lindsie broke his heart when she eloped with her now-husband, Will, without telling her family. While Lindsie recovers from plastic surgery, Todd and Will make an effort to find some common ground at the shooting range.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Two Men and a Baby
programme.desc: The Chrisleys welcome a new addition to the family: Baby Chloe. Chloe is Kyle's daughter, and she is coming to live with Todd and Julie while they teach Kyle 'Parenting 101.' Savannah and Chase get into a fender bender in Savannah's new car.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Extra Spooky: Smells Like Halloween Spirit
programme.desc: The bakers create spine-chilling desserts guided by spirits, such as bourbon and rum. Then, they bring old desserts back to life using fresh flavors and colorful decorations in the Day of the Dead main heat.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Extra Spooky: All Things Weird and Wonderful
programme.desc: Comedian John Henson hosts as the six remaining bakers’ team up to create desserts that pay tribute to the iconic Addams Family -- scary on the outside and sweet on the inside.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Extra Spooky: Creepy and Crusty Creations
programme.desc: Host John Henson's 'mummy' issues inspire the pre-heat challenge of crepe cakes, and judges Carla Hall, Katie Lee and Zac Young decide on the creepiest.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Extra Spooky: Gravely Delicious Desserts
programme.desc: John Henson hosts as the remaining four bakers go digging to create terrifyingly tasty grave-robber desserts.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: A Haunting We Will Go
programme.desc: Host John Henson instructs the three remaining bakers to construct a 'Ghostembouche', or ghostly version of a croquembouche tower. Then they face the final challenge of creating a bleeding zombie cake for judges Carla Hall, Katie Lee and Zac Young.

programme.title: Outrageous Pumpkins: Fa-Boo-lous Pumpkins
programme.desc: Packed with never-before-seen footage from the cutting room floor, bonus trivia and tons of tips and tricks, this special carves deeper into all things pumpkin. Casey Webb hosts as four of America's best carvers come together for a Halloween competition.

programme.title: Halloween Cake-Off: Infestation!
programme.desc: Duff challenges the bakers to create cakes that have become infested and decayed. The final three head home to build their masterpieces made to rot before the judges' eyes. The final cakes are scream worthy with shocking transformations.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: A Haunting We Will Go

programme.desc: It's nothing but fried fun when four chefs are challenged with making dishes full of fried fair food. They will have to follow a bizarre grocery list for the first challenge before getting a skimpy budget to make fried chicken for the next challenge.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Drummond Home Cooking
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making a special meal to deliver to Beverly, the curator of the Drummond family's historic home and museum. Recipes include grape lemonade, old fashioned chicken stew, and lemon raspberry cream cake.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Glenda's Birthday Costume Party
programme.desc: Trisha celebrates her friend Glenda's birthday and cooks up a few dressed-up food dishes for their special costume party.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Masquerade and Cocktails
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood throws an all-out New Orleans-themed party for her friends. Her menu for the festivities features beignets, mini crab cakes, roast beef po' boys, and an ode to NOLA cocktail.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Trisha's Halloween Prep
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood and her friend Glenda try out Halloween costume ideas and test recipes like Jack-O-Lantern stuffed peppers, roasted butternut squash with spooky chips, caramel apples and a black light cocktail.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Friends And Chocolate
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood invites the ladies over for a girls' lunch. The menu includes linguine with braised red wine short rib sauce, marinated roasted portobellos, chocolate cherry martinis and classic molten chocolate cake with cassis berries.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Trisha's Halloween Spooktacular
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood gathers her closest friends for the most terrifyingly delicious Halloween party, complete with a monstrous menu of edible sea creatures and bloody dessert bars.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Falafel Night
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is making a Middle Eastern feast for her college friends visiting the farm, and the food is as colorful as the company! Molly starts with her crispy falafel and a creamy homemade labneh.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: There's a burning on the prairie, but in Ree Drummond's kitchen, everything is sweet, stocked up and frozen. She's making mini chocolate-pecan-caramel cheesecakes that are elegant enough for impromptu entertaining and simple ice cream truffles two ways.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Mom Deliveries
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is honoring some of her favorite moms by making sweet deliveries. She starts with strawberry cheesecake brownies for her stepmom and a blood orange rosemary pound cake to pack up and mail to her mom, Gerre.

programme.title: Chopped Junior: Halloween Party!
programme.desc: With gory surprises in every basket, the costumed competitors have much to fear and $10,000 to gain in this Halloween showdown, presided over by judges Scott Conant, event planner Jackie Sorkin and actress Michelle Trachtenberg.

programme.title: Chopped: Flour Power
programme.desc: Four bold female bakers attempt to rise to the challenge and clinch a victory. A dough typically used for flatbreads and a strong-tasting melon are two of the mystery basket items in round one. A different dough is at the center of the second basket.

programme.title: Chopped: Pie Jinks
programme.desc: Sour gummies and sausage are part of the first of three rounds of pie challenges. Chefs must make savory pies with baby kale for the entree round followed by a dessert basket containing candied ginger. The winning chef receives $10,000.

programme.title: Around the Horn
programme.desc: Host, Tony Reali, and sports reporters representing each time zone via satellite, banter about their local and national sports stories. Reali hosts and keeps score on every comment from his studio where he is connected to each columnist's newsroom.

programme.title: Total DramaRama: A Licking Time Bomb

programme.desc: Jude brings a chicken with a bad attitude back to the school, but its bad behavior starts getting on everyone's nerves.

programme.title: Total DramaRama: Know it All

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Riding the Dragon
programme.desc: The Titans become shipwrecked on a desert island.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: The Overbite

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Shrimps and Prime Rib

programme.desc: The family has to stop doing stupid things to prevent Anais from falling into a coma from face palming too much.

programme.desc: Nicole reconciles with her parents.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Founder

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Schooling
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin take on Larry's jobs for 5 minutes and realize how bad it is.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Baby Bears Can't Jump
programme.desc: In order to win a pizza, the Baby Bears play basketball against a ragtag gang of kids.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: The Mummy's Curse
programme.desc: The Baby Bears must return a mummy to its tomb or else they’ll be cursed forever.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Bearz II Men
programme.desc: The Baby Bears and a teen work together to make his musical dreams come true.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: Band of Outsiders
programme.desc: A gang of streetwise kids takes Baby Ice Bear under their wing.

programme.title: American Dad!: An Incident at Owl Creek
programme.desc: In preparation for a neighbourhood pool party, Stan tells his family to get in tip-top shape. When an accident ruins the Smith family name, a humiliated Stan fakes his family's deaths and moves everyone out of Langley Falls to escape his shame.

programme.title: American Dad!: Poltergasm
programme.desc: Francine's ghost starts to haunt the Smith household when she is unsatisfied by Stan in the sack, and Roger must conjure a medium named Zelda Rubinstein to help eliminate the ghost. Meanwhile, Hayley introduces her new boy-toy, Mauricio, to the family.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Mo Mommy Mo Problems
programme.desc: The Belchers attend open houses for the free food, per Linda's 'momnipotent' Mother's Day request. When Linda meets a charming real estate agent and agrees to a private showing, the kids stumble upon an unexpected surprise.

programme.title: NCIS: The Artful Dodger

programme.title: NCIS: Status Update
programme.desc: After the body of a thief is found in a marine's house, the team discovers the calling card of a terror group Delilah and the Department of Defense have been tracking.

programme.title: NCIS: Patience
programme.desc: The murder of a petty officer sparks a lead in a 40-year-old airport bombing cold case that Gibbs and DiNozzo have been assigned to for the past two years. Also, McGee is jealous that he was not previously briefed on the cold case.

programme.title: NCIS: No Good Deed
programme.desc: DiNozzo is partnered with his girlfriend, ATF Special Agent Zoé Keates, after evidence reveals that the murder weapon in an NCIS case was originally purchased for the controversial ATF sting operation.

programme.title: NCIS: Troll

programme.title: NCIS: The Lost Boys

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Badge
programme.desc: The murder of a city auditor and his family leads to a corrupt group of former officers.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Tuxedo Hill
programme.desc: During the course of an investigation, detectives uncover a financial scandal linked to the crime.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Seven Indictments
programme.desc: When a charred body is found in a torched house, Intelligence must work to identify the victim, as well as a young boy who is found badly injured inside. As they work towards identifying the victim, they uncover a web of secrets and lies.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Favor, Affection, Malice or Ill-Will
programme.desc: When Lindsay is tipped off about a grieving father looking to avenge his daughter's death, Olinsky goes undercover as a hitman-for-hire. Meanwhile, Ruzek comes back after finishing his undercover assignment, only to have Voight knock him down to patrol.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Emotional Proximity
programme.desc: Olinsky's daughter remains in critical condition following a massive fire, leaving Intelligence on edge, but more determined than ever to track down the suspect.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Remember the Devil
programme.desc: After being tipped off about a woman running barefoot through the woods, Intelligence is led to a kidnapping victim locked up in a shipping container.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Little Bit of Light

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Last Minute Resistance
programme.desc: After encouraging her sister to spend a night out with friends, Burgess wakes up to find that Nicole never made it home. As the guilt begins to eat at Burgess, the team in Intelligence bands together to find Nicole.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Grasping for Salvation
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a teenage boy, Voight finds a connection to an old case. The victim's father, a prominent defense attorney, tries to get the case taken over by Area Central Homicide.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Fagin
programme.desc: The team is called to an in-progress bank robbery and find a detective trying to take over the crime scene. As the robberies continue to be executed around the city, Lindsay is forced to make a decision in the heat of the moment.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Army of One
programme.desc: A live video is streamed online showcasing a tortured man being beaten and burned alive. Upon further investigation, the victim's identity is traced back to that of a man who had been locked up for statutory rape.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Fork in the Road

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Seven Indictments
programme.desc: When a charred body is found in a torched house, Intelligence must work to identify the victim, as well as a young boy who is found badly injured inside. As they work towards identifying the victim, they uncover a web of secrets and lies.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Atlantis: The New Mystery

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Curse of the Catacombs

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Atlantis: The New Treasures
programme.desc: After experts discover an ancient lost city off the coast of Egypt, the race to unearth its priceless relics and bring this mysterious sunken world back to life begins, revealing the doomsday event that caused it to sink into the sea.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant
Secrets of the Lost: Secrets of the Alien Relic
programme.desc: A strange, alien artifact discovered in the ruins of an ancient Greek shipwreck holds the secrets of a technology thousands of years ahead of its time. Now experts are using cutting-edge science to reveal what this mysterious device was used for.

programme.title: Unearthed: Nero's Lost Palace
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the scandals and secrets of Nero and his lost palace. Using cutting-edge technology, experts may confirm if the infamous emperor burned down Rome so his could build his golden wonder.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the Jungle Treasure
programme.desc: The discovery of strange giant stone heads in the Mexican jungle leads archaeologists to the lost capital city of the Olmec, and new investigations reveal evidence that the secret knowledge of these mysterious people changed life in the Americas forever.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of the Cursed Pyramid
programme.desc: Egypt's strange bent pyramid is one of the world's most mysterious ancient mega-structures, and new discoveries help experts investigate its dark secret: if it was always intended to look so bizarre, or if something went catastrophically wrong.

programme.title: Unearthed: Pompeii's Doomsday Mummies
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal dark secrets of the event that destroyed Pompeii.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of the Maya

programme.title: Unearthed: Inca Apocalypse: The Dark Evidence
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal secrets behind the fall of the Inca capital of Cusco.

programme.title: Unearthed: Finding Sparta's 300
programme.desc: New discoveries might lead investigators to the legendary group of 300 Spartan warriors who died fighting off one million invading Persians, and using cutting-edge tech, experts reconstruct the lost battlefield to uncover the secrets of their last stand.

programme.title: Unearthed: Forbidden City of the Pharaohs
programme.desc: A mysterious city in ancient Egypt is the home of the Valley of the Kings and grand temples, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and if the god the pharaohs worshiped here helped them rise to power.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT

programme.title: The Big House: Colorado State
programme.desc: Filmmakers explore one of America's harshest security facilities and its rich past.

programme.title: The Big House: Kentucky State Penitentiary
programme.desc: Cameras follow an officer on his shift and step inside the Kentucky State Pen high security block.

programme.title: The Big House: Attica Prison
programme.desc: This prison was hailed as a model for the confinement of the most dangerous criminals.

programme.title: The Big House: Montana State Prison
programme.desc: Today, the state prison in Deer Lodge, Montana operates as both a ranch and a modern high-security prison but its legacy is dark and its history is marked by violent uprisings.

programme.title: The Big House: Folsom
programme.desc: An inside-the-walls look at the violent history of Folsom Prison, which opened in 1880.

programme.title: The Big House: Parchman
programme.desc: Originally a slave plantation ruled by the whip, today Parchman's most important crop is neither food nor cotton, but prisoners.

programme.title: American Justice: Body of Evidence: The Tom Capano Trial
programme.desc: Prosecutor Thomas Capano was sentenced to death for murdering his ex-lover.

programme.title: American Justice: A Questionable Doctor
programme.desc: Dr. Naramore was convicted of attempting to murder a 78-year-old terminally ill woman.

programme.title: Nightwatch: After Hours: Fallen Brother
programme.desc: The city is in mourning after a well-loved Police officer is shot and killed on duty.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Guardians of the City
programme.desc: Titus and Dan treat a woman who was viciously stabbed in the face, and Holly and Nick tend to an emotional young transgendered woman who was assaulted. A wild police chase ends with a major car accident.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Pritchert
programme.desc: Craig Pritchert and his girlfriend are a modern day Bonnie and Clyde. After falling in love, the two go on a bank robbery spree, and flee the country with $500,000 in cash. After being spotted in Cape Town, the FBI sends a team to take the two down.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Danny Ray Horning
programme.desc: Horning goes to the one place he thinks he'll never be found, the Grand Canyon. Living off the land, he evades capture in the longest and largest manhunt in Arizona state history.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Nichols
programme.desc: Suffering from loneliness while living in the isolated Rocky Mountains, Dan and Don Nichols kidnap a local female and try to convince her to become Dan's bride.

programme.title: Female Forces: DUI's and Don'ts
programme.desc: A drunken male suspect gets a little rough; a public indecency suspect causes trouble.

programme.title: Female Forces: Ready to Rumble
programme.desc: The women of Naperville PD show just how tough they are as they combat out of control suspects including a kid who tries to charge one of the officers and a mother with a violent daughter seeking advice.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Burned Alive
programme.desc: On a back road in Mississippi, a popular 19-year-old girl is set on fire and left to burn alive. Her last words lead detectives down a road of dead ends and the case goes cold until a special agent taps into her location data and finds a suspect.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Who Killed Jane Doe 59?
programme.desc: Police search for the name of an unidentified woman murdered in 1969 and the person who killed her. The one lead that keeps coming up is Charles Manson and the Manson Family.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Cabin 28: Horror in the Woods
programme.desc: A mother and three teens are murdered in the remote town of Keddie, California. Despite a trail of suspects and illicit activity, no one was ever brought to justice. But recently discovered evidence may be the key to finally cracking case.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Stranger Online
programme.desc: 13-year-old Nicole Lovell signed on to the Kik messaging app looking for a friend, and instead became the victim of an anonymous online predator. Peter Van Sant reports.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Nightmare on Oak Hollow Drive
programme.desc: Etta Jean Westbrook is a long-time resident in a quiet suburb in Bryan, Texas. When she is found dead inside her home, detectives question her loved ones and canvass the neighbourhood in order to catch the killer before they strike again.

programme.title: The Murder Shed
programme.desc: Police in Edmonton, Alberta are shocked to learn that a serial killer taking inspiration from a television show may be at work in their community.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Bloodlines
programme.desc: An elderly couple are found murdered in their home. At first it's believed to be a robbery-gone-wrong until detectives realize it may me a family member with a grudge.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Nightmare on Oak Hollow Drive
programme.desc: Etta Jean Westbrook is a long-time resident in a quiet suburb in Bryan, Texas. When she is found dead inside her home, detectives question her loved ones and canvass the neighbourhood in order to catch the killer before they strike again.

programme.title: The Murder Shed
programme.desc: Police in Edmonton, Alberta are shocked to learn that a serial killer taking inspiration from a television show may be at work in their community.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Bloodlines
programme.desc: An elderly couple are found murdered in their home. At first it's believed to be a robbery-gone-wrong until detectives realize it may me a family member with a grudge.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Stranger Online
programme.desc: 13-year-old Nicole Lovell signed on to the Kik messaging app looking for a friend, and instead became the victim of an anonymous online predator. Peter Van Sant reports.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: The Night Shift
programme.desc: A rookie cop struggles to resist temptation when he meets a beautiful exotic dancer while on shift. But he's keeping secrets not just from his sergeants but his new girlfriend too. And he'll stop at nothing to keep his double life secret.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Million Dollar Christy
programme.desc: A female boxing Phenom enters a forbidden relationship with her trainer. But when another secret passion bubbles to the surface and she tries to leave his controlling grip, she finds herself fighting for her life.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: Beast with a Badge
programme.desc: A detective struggles to exonerate his friend, a black former cop, from rape allegations pinned on him by the LAPD's all-white brass. He'll navigate entrenched racism, lead a stake-out and employ the magic of Hollywood to ensnare the real predator.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: The Gentleman Killer
programme.desc: Bronx, NY, 1941: When tea for two becomes a murder of one, investigators from all across New York City must act upon the testimony of a few brave women to bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: Once Upon a Crime
programme.desc: Four members of the Cutter family are murdered in cold blood and detectives mount a nationwide search for the killers.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Bugs Bunny Defense
programme.desc: A woman claims she accidentally shot her husband when they were re-enacting a moment from a Bugs Bunny cartoon.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Sober Truth
programme.desc: An alcoholic young woman thought she had found help in a safe place, what she found was a killer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder by Design
programme.desc: Investigators are looking into the killing spree that ended the life of Gianni Versace in Miami 20 years ago.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Was His First Victim
programme.desc: Felecia Collier almost killed Chester Turner once. At the time, she was relieved to hear that he would survive. But years later, that moment would become the biggest regret of her life. If only she had just killed him.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Put on a Happy Face
programme.desc: Melissa Moore loved being daddy's little girl, and thought her father, Keith Jesperson, could do no wrong. As she got older, that admiration was replaced by fear, and then by the horror of learning how close she had come to being his next victim.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Wish I'd Turned Around
programme.desc: Kat Harris and Marla Kreuger each loved Lawrence Harris in her own way. Each dismissed his dark obsession as childish and strange, but harmless. Neither of them realized he was preparing to sacrifice innocent lives for his evil purpose.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Was a Good Man to Me
programme.desc: When Alvin "Bud" Brown was arrested he told an officer that he was just like Hannibal Lecter. But, to his wife, Jackie, the man she shared a bed with for years appeared to be gentle and loving until the Thanksgiving Day when she discovered the truth.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Tunnel of Hate
programme.desc: An industrious woman and an ambitious man become neighbors when they buy adjoining houses. Both intend to restore the derelict homes to former glory, but when one of the renovations falls badly behind, it leads to conflict and a shocking murder.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Civil War
programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Gold
programme.desc: A look at the history of gold, where most of it resides today and who owns it.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Cold War in Space
programme.desc: July 21st, 1969 saw one of the iconic events of the 20th century when the Apollo 10 crew set foot on the moon. However, some claim the moon landings were faked. A hacker claims to have found evidence of a U.S. space fleet fueled by alien technology.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Pearl Harbor Cover Up
programme.desc: History says that this was the ultimate sneak attack, but conspiracists are convinced that the U.S. President knew it was coming and decided to sacrifice their own troops to give the country an excuse to join the war against Germany.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Lockerbie Plot
programme.desc: An inquiry into whether Iran was really behind the Lockerbie Bombing, if the CIA invented and promoted suicide bombing in the Middle East, why there were no photos of Bin Laden's body and if 9/11 was actually an inside job.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Sex, Drugs and Rock 'n' Roll
programme.desc: A look at some of the conspiracies surrounding iconic bands such as Led Zeppelin, The Sex Pistols and The Doors.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Pearl Harbor Cover Up

programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, Federal forces clash with a massive rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, General Robert E. Lee brings his Army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood-soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bat Masterson: Defender of Dodge
programme.desc: This well-dressed gunfighter was a gambler, a hunter, an Indian fighter, and a scout; but above all else, Bat Masterson was a lawman. As Sheriff of Ford County, Kansas, Bat Masterson kept the peace on the volatile Frontier.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Butch Cassidy: The Perfect Criminal
programme.desc: Until the day he died, whenever that was, nobody ever outsmarted Butch Cassidy. He always got away. Cassidy was an outlaw who lived more by his wits than by his gun.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Machine Gun Kelly
programme.desc: George Francis Barnes J, better known as 'Machine Gun Kelly,' was an Irish American gangster during the Prohibition era. His nickname came from his favourite weapon, a Thompson submachine gun.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Al Capone
programme.desc: Al Capone is America's best known gangster and perhaps the single greatest symbol of the collapse of law and order in the United States during the Prohibition era of the 1920s. The FBI branded the bootlegging kingpin America's 'Public Enemy #1.'

programme.title: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: Discover how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler that he was a modern day Pharaoh.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Playing Catch Up
programme.desc: All three builds are running behind schedule and must rush to get ahead. John and Heather build a water catchment system but discover they aren't getting enough water pressure, Chris Maynard's windows are delivered by helicopter in strong winds.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Not for Beginners
programme.desc: Time is running out for the builders to complete their projects. Chris gets help installing solar panels and sets up cameras to watch for bears. Meanwhile, Josh works on the custom log stairs as Jeremy takes his time to cut and build custom windows.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Look What They've Done
programme.desc: The builders are in the final push to finish their cabins before winter strikes and they must shut down. Josh and his team fight the elements to install the wood stove and finish the roof. Chris and his wife rush to install kitchen counters and furniture.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Honey Hole
programme.desc: Mark needs a lot of inventory in a hurry so he buys three cabins. It's a fast-paced triple takedown full of suspense, strategy and big crashes. The guys are still able to discover family stories that give these logs history and meaning.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Lone Star Boneyard
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and the crew start a new boneyard in Texas by building a timber frame barn and two log cabins with some help from their new business partner. Mark gets his first look at the incredible party barn they built the last time they were in Texas.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Montana Barn Battle
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders square off against their toughest barn yet- a stubborn old timber frame with wooden pegs, metal spikes, steel bolts and a whole lot of beams. But saving this barn is worth the effort because it will be rebuilt for a veterans group.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Operation Hero
programme.desc: Mark and his team take on their hardest build ever for their most important client: America's wounded warriors. The guys work side by side with veterans to construct a giant timber frame lodge for Project Healing Waters.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Lone Star Boneyard
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and the crew start a new boneyard in Texas by building a timber frame barn and two log cabins with some help from their new business partner. Mark gets his first look at the incredible party barn they built the last time they were in Texas.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Montana Barn Battle
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders square off against their toughest barn yet- a stubborn old timber frame with wooden pegs, metal spikes, steel bolts and a whole lot of beams. But saving this barn is worth the effort because it will be rebuilt for a veterans group.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Operation Hero
programme.desc: Mark and his team take on their hardest build ever for their most important client: America's wounded warriors. The guys work side by side with veterans to construct a giant timber frame lodge for Project Healing Waters.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Honey Hole
programme.desc: Mark needs a lot of inventory in a hurry so he buys three cabins. It's a fast-paced triple takedown full of suspense, strategy and big crashes. The guys are still able to discover family stories that give these logs history and meaning.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Rustic on the River
programme.desc: Brock and Chase tackle an old river cabin and transform the living space with timber beams, wood floors and a custom entertainment center. Then, a wood slat wall defines the space and is accented by a walnut kitchen island with hand wrought metal legs.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Transforming a Shipping Container Into a Portable Barnwood Cabin
programme.desc: Mark and the guys turn a used shipping container into a portable barnwood cabin. They use welding torches and old logs to transform the steel container into a home. Mark searches for the perfect red barnwood to cover it.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Larry Melton's Chance of a Lifetime
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders, after once saving Larry Melton's childhood home, do something they've never done before. They invite Larry to the Boneyard to help restore his family home. Mark also arranges a final surprise with some very special guests.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: High-End Timber Frame Kitchen In Brevard, Nc
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders build a timber frame kitchen that will be the centerpiece of a high-end mountain retreat in Brevard, NC. Later, Mark and the guys visit some of the architect's other spectacular log homes.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Cabin in the Quarry
programme.desc: The builders float down the Ohio River and land in Paducah, Kentucky, where they try to save a little cabin in a big quarry. Alex makes a chair, Johnny drives a dump truck, Sherman makes a quilt, and Mark helps build a barnwood table.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Raising a Massive Timber Frame Barn in Downtown Lewisburg
programme.desc: Mark and the guys work in downtown Lewisburg, West Virginia, to raise a massive timber frame as the new shelter for the Lewisburg farmer's market. The 200-year-old logs prove to be a challenge when the builders begin to raise the bents.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Rebuilding the 100% Cabin and Restoring a Legacy
programme.desc: Mark and the guys take the 100% cabin to South Carolina where they rebuild it as a hunting cabin. While they are there, they work with the client's kids to build a camping cabin out of their ancestor's log home.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Island Fishing Cabin
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and the Barnwood Builders take the logs from season 3's Bird's-Eye Barn across the New River and put them back together on a West Virginia island.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Cowboy Party Barn in New Braunfels, TX
programme.desc: Mark and the guys return to Texas to build a gigantic party barn out of an old timber frame. They use old-fashioned tools to retrofit the barn for modern use, and they install a rare swing beam in the center bent.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Big Ol' Buckeye Cabin
programme.desc: The builders have never seen a log home as large as this Ohio cabin. They discovery it's filled with history, craftsmanship and a lot of cherished memories. Mark also gives the cabin owner tips on how to convert the bar into a modern home.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barn Storming: A Wild Takedown in Pleasantville, Ohio
programme.desc: Mark and the guys have fought rain, snow and heat, but they've never had winds like these! The vicious Ohio winds turn a complicated job into a treacherous one as they attempt to save a giant double pen barn.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: My Fair Latte
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts off in Chippewa Falls, Wis., at the Northern Wisconsin State Fair. The Wisconsin woods are the inspiration for the loaded Campfire Burger, and the state's famous cheese curds make an appearance in the Hot Chick.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Deep-Fried Inferno
programme.desc: Where there's smoke, there's fire, and Noah Cappe is ready to have his taste buds fired up at the Spencerport Volunteer Firemen's Association Carnival in New York. From the Flaming Weck to the Five Alarm Fries, there's plenty of sizzle.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Omaha, Nebraska
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Omaha to satisfy his hunger in the heartland. He chows down on a historic Reuben sandwich, a soul food feast featuring fried chicken from a 100-year-old recipe.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charleston, SC
programme.desc: Casey heads to Charleston, SC, for some epic low country eats. He takes on the belt buster challenge where he must consume a two-pound burger, three pounds of nachos, a hulking order of tater tots and a 12-ounce milkshake in 20 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Alaska
programme.desc: Adam goes to Alaska for a massive burger, a mountainous breakfast and a monster challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Pittsburgh, Pa
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Pittsburgh for creative eats and a five-pound sandwich loaded with meat, cheese, fries and coleslaw.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Decadent Donuts
programme.desc: Alton Brown takes us on a trip to Memphis to honor the original glazed doughnut that started it all.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chocolate Bliss
programme.desc: When it comes to chocolate, the possibilities for sweet treats are endless. On the ultimate list of the best chocolate treats in America, Ali Khan devours an unbelievable Dark Truffle Cake from San Antonio, Texas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Desert Island Dish
programme.desc: Mayday! Mayday! The chefs and foodies are stranded on a desert island with nothing but an appetite, and they're sharing the one dish they simply can't live without.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Culinary Revolutions
programme.desc: There's no denying that some foods have revolutionized the culinary game while making stomachs happy. Scott Conant gives new meaning to an old favorite with an updated take on classic potato tots.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Feats Of Meat
programme.desc: Chefs share the most mouth-watering meat dishes they've ever eaten.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Worth the Wait
programme.desc: Alton Brown talks up his favorite beef Wellington, while Jamika Pessoa melts over buttery biscuits.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: The Whole Hog
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson goes hog-wild all day with dishes that use every single part of the pig. Simple strips of bacon for breakfast just won't do, and forget about basic barbecue. These are the perfect porky portions for an entire day of pigging out.

programme.title: Patti Labelle's Place: Ta'rhonda Jones And Lance Gross
programme.desc: Patti has star power in her kitchen today. First, Ta'Rhonda Jones drops by to learn Patti's delicious Pork Chops with Sauteed Cabbage. Then, Patti refreshes her palate with actress Kaitlin Doubleday over a vegan lunch.

programme.title: Patti Labelle's Place: Estelle and Joe Zee
programme.desc: Patti LaBelle invites her friend, fashion guru Joe Zee, over for a simple Shrimp Scampi served over Angel Hair Pasta. She tops off the meal with Apple-Peach Compote and Vanilla Ice Cream.

programme.title: Patti Labelle's Place: 50 Cent and Naturi Naughton

programme.title: Patti Labelle's Place: Gayle King and Jay Manuel

programme.title: Patti Labelle's Place: Robin Roberts and Joseph Sikora
programme.desc: Patti LaBelle makes a slow-cooked Southern meal for her good friend and morning show anchor Robin Roberts.

programme.title: Patti Labelle's Place: Laverne Cox and Tamron Hall

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Big D Delights

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Mealin' and Dealin' In Michigan

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Mystery
programme.desc: Kansas City Mickey sets out to find an ancient mouse-eared stone monument deep in the Hidden Jungle.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie Red Riding Hood
programme.desc: Just like the fairy tale, Minnie comes across trouble in the woods.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald the Genie
programme.desc: Donald becomes a genuine magical genie and realizes it is not as easy as it sounds when he is only able to grant one wish to each Clubhouse friend.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Monster Musical
programme.desc: Mickey Mouse and his friends teach important skills through their adventures.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: The Haunted Hot Rod/ Pete's Ghostly Gala
programme.desc: Mickey wants to race the Haunted Hot Rod, a ghostly Roadster who only races on Halloween. The Happy Helpers try to catch three ghosts who threaten to ruin Pete's Halloween Party.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Phantom of the Café / Cuckoo in Paris
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang participate in high-spirited races around the globe.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Hi, Jinx!/ Pete's Junkyard Helpers
programme.desc: Emmy Lou meets Jinx the cat and gets the gang to help her find the kitty a new home. The Happy Helpers run Pete's junkyard while he takes his Mama out to lunch for her birthday.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Treat
programme.desc: The Sensational Six enlist viewers' help in getting to the Trick-or-Treat Tower for the big Halloween party. They use a garbage can lid as Goofy the Knight's shield and a jack-o-lantern to light the way through the Foggy Forest.

programme.title: Bluey: Trampoline/ The Dump/ Zoo
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want to play games on the trampoline with Dad; Dad, Bluey and Bingo head to the dump to throw away their rubbish; Bluey and Bingo play pretend zoo.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Take Your Dog to Work Day / Slumber Paw-ty
programme.desc: The pups lose an important part of Bob's presentation during Take Your Dog to Work Day. Bob, the pugs and Keia run out of popcorn at their first slumber party.

programme.title: Movie: Spookley the Square Pumpkin
programme.desc: A pumpkin named Spookley is born in a pumpkin patch. He looks nothing like the other pumpkins! His shape is square, which makes the other pumpkins poke fun at him. After a terrible storm Spookley realizes it can be handy to be different.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Cheetah Chase / Training Daze
programme.desc: When a cheetah is accidentally set loose, Pip and Freddy must play a game of tag to catch it; Pip and Freddy find themselves leading a group of storks on a class trip.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Racing Rivals/ The Hapless Helpers
programme.desc: Minnie comes up with a special race that can include her visiting childhood friend. While the girls enjoy a spa day, the boys fill in as Happy Helpers.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Super-Charged: The Big Cheesy / Shenannygans!
programme.desc: During the Cooper's Hill Cheese Rolling Chase, a cheese wheel spins out of control! The Happy Helpers work as nannies for two children in London and take them on new experiences!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Cuckoo for Cuckoo Clocks/Good Reef
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly head to Germany to replace the bird in Bob's cuckoo clock. While on a scuba vacation, the pugs search the coral reefs for Bob's lost diving flippers.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keep On Food Truckin'/ Pupigan's Island
programme.desc: The pugs plan to bring Bob's favorite food truck back to him but Cupcake and Rufus have a different plan. Bob and the pups are on a whale tour when their boat runs into an island.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Secret of the Pagoda/ Storm of the Ninja
programme.desc: While Catboy is too busy trying to impress An Yu, Night Ninja enters the pagoda. An Yu tries to solve an ancient riddle to become a true Mountain Master.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Windy City/ Sham-pooch
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to the Windy City for Bob's kite! Keia is nervous about going to the groomer, so the pugs make it their mission to help her.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Treat
programme.desc: The Sensational Six enlist viewers' help in getting to the Trick-or-Treat Tower for the big Halloween party. They use a garbage can lid as Goofy the Knight's shield and a jack-o-lantern to light the way through the Foggy Forest.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Food Fight/ Please Don't Feed the Turners
programme.desc: Timmy wishes Mom were the best chef in the world.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: He Said She Said/ Attack of the Zombies
programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany give wildly differing versions of why the fire alarm went off at the school. Convinced a zombie invasion is imminent, Alvin and Theodore attempt to protect their loved ones.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: A Is for Alien/ Jeanette Enchanted
programme.desc: When Theodore disappears from his bed, Alvin is positive that he has been kidnapped by aliens. The Chipmunks and Chipettes join forces in order to offer Jeanette a magical, fairy-tale birthday.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Nasty Patty/ Idiot Box

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Goo Goo Gas/ Le Big Switch
programme.desc: Plankton creates a gas that turns everyone at the Krusty Krab into babies. After being enrolled in a cooks exchange program, SpongeBob switches places with a snooty French chef from a high-end restaurant.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Dear Vikings/ Ditchin'
programme.desc: When Krusty Krab starts a new promotion in honour of the Vikings, SpongeBob sets out to learn all he can about this civilization.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Born Again Krabs/ Safety Freak SpongeBob
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs refuses to let SpongeBob throw away a mouldy Krabby Patty under the grill.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy IV/ Doing Time
programme.desc: Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy are eating when Mermaid Man accidentally drops his belt.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Giant Squidward/ No Nose Knows
programme.desc: When Squidward gets spritzed with plant growth spray, he becomes monstrously huge. Patrick gets a nose.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mooncation/ Mr. Krabs Takes a Vacation
programme.desc: SpongeBob house-sits for Sandy, and all is quiet until Patrick shows up. After losing their passes, SpongeBob and Squidward try to sneak backstage at the sold-out Kelpy G show.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Gullible Pants/ Overbooked

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Welcome to Chum Bucket/ Frankendoodle
programme.desc: Mr. Krab loses SpongeBob's fry cook contract in a bet with Plankton and SpongeBob is forced to go work at the Chum Bucket; When SpongeBob and Pat discover a pencil from the surface, they begin to draw with it and everything they draw comes to life.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Nature Pants/ Opposite Day

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Clash of Triton
programme.desc: SpongeBob wants his friends and family to help celebrate King Neptune's birthday.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Slippery Motives
programme.desc: While staying at a hotel in St. Louis, Missouri, a Louisiana woman drowns in a bathtub. Her husband claims it was an accident, but detectives are skeptical as they discover evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A high school student vanishes without a trace. False leads force detectives to work double time until a prostitute's murder demands police attention and the possibility arises that the same killer may have struck twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skeleton Key
programme.desc: Police think an abusive ex-boyfriend is to blame for a young woman's disappearance, but a set of keys discovered in her vehicle don't match up with either the ex-boyfriend or the victim.

programme.title: Weather Underground

programme.title: World's Wildest Weather: Flash Flood Nightmare
programme.desc: A mother and her child are imprisoned on the roof of their home during a flood, a man is buried alive under 13 feet of rubble following a Brazilian mudslide, and a Maryland hero tells how he saved a woman trapped in flash floods.

programme.title: World's Wildest Weather: Midwest Miracle
programme.desc: We hear the story of the survivors of an EF4 tornado in Henryville, Indiana who sheltered in the basement as the school above them was ripped to pieces.

programme.title: World's Wildest Weather: Racing a Wildfire
programme.desc: In Australia, a tourist drives straight into the path of a raging bushfire, unrelenting floods cause thousands of people to flee their homes, and a man sees his life flash before his eyes as he is struck in the head by lightning.

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Raining Spiders
programme.desc: Lightning creates a storm of spiders, freaky weather turns a beach into a winter wonderland, a "weather-bomb" floods a town with eels, plus toxic algae and "Manhattan Henge" on this episode of Strangest Weather on Earth.

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Noisy Nature
programme.desc: In this episode, the weather creates a strange symphony. Light sabre sounds mysteriously resonate from icy lakes, rocks ring like bells and deadly multiple twisters roar and rage across the earth.

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Worldwide Weather Wipeouts
programme.desc: Lakes are boiled and frogs frozen alive. Plagues of locusts rain down and snow buries a city. Explore global weather wipeouts from Maryland to the Middle East.

programme.title: Deadliest Space Weather: Mars
programme.desc: A look at the meteorological conditions on Mars, a frozen, desert planet often struck by massive sandstorms that can envelop the entire planet for months at a time.

programme.title: Deadliest Space Weather: Ice Moons
programme.desc: A look at Europa, one of Jupiter's frozen moons.

programme.title: Deadliest Space Weather: Fastest Winds in the Solar System
programme.desc: A study of the winds of Neptune which are six times as powerful as a Category 5 hurricane.

programme.title: Deadliest Space Weather: Meteors
programme.desc: Meteors range from golf ball-sized rocks crashing through homes to Mount Everest-sized boulders triggering mass extinctions. They can violently alter our atmosphere and climate, as well as threaten our very existence.

programme.title: Deadliest Space Weather: Venus
programme.desc: Venus may originally have looked like our planet, but today it's a world of runaway greenhouse gases and acid rains corrosive enough to eat through metal. Astronomer and planetary scientists reveal why the climate of Venus went so horribly wrong.

programme.title: Deadliest Space Weather: Biggest Storm in the Solar System
programme.desc: A look at Jupiter's 300-year-old hurricane with winds that blow at 400 miles per hour.

programme.desc: An aspiring journalist gets a job with a top fashion magazine in New York City. The job turns out to be more than she bargained for, however, when it keeps her at work for hours on end and creates trouble in her life at home with her boyfriend.

programme.title: Chopped: Sweets Showdown: Chocolate!
programme.desc: Kicking off a first-of-its-kind, high-stakes desserts tournament, four chefs compete in a series of chocolate challenges. Spicy booze and a book filled with bonbons are in the mix in round one.

programme.title: Chopped: Sweets Showdown: Doughnuts!
programme.desc: It's much ado about doughnuts in this exciting heat of the $50,000 Sweets Showdown. The chefs must demonstrate doughnut dexterity as they create sweet, savory and filled varieties that incorporate challenging ingredients such as onions and grasshoppers.

programme.title: Chopped: Sweets Showdown: Cake!
programme.desc: With their eyes on the Sweets Showdown $50,000 prize, four top-tier dessert chefs strive to bake their way into the judges' hearts in this all-cakes preliminary battle. A beautifully bare edible art piece is at the center of the first basket.

programme.title: Chopped: Sweets Showdown: Ice Cream!
programme.desc: The $50,000 Sweets Showdown continues with a preliminary battle that shines the spotlight on ice cream. Each round challenges the competitors to churn out a different frozen treat: milkshakes, ice cream sandwiches and sundaes.

programme.title: Chopped: Sweets Showdown: Grand Finale!
programme.desc: In the thrilling culmination of a five-part tournament, four dessert dynamos return to the Chopped Kitchen in pursuit of the $50,000 prize.

programme.title: Chopped: Hot Dog Hotshots
programme.desc: The chefs gear up for an epic hot dog battle in a nonstop celebration of the phenomenal frankfurter. In the appetizer basket, they discover a hot dog creation that takes the prized piece of Americana to another level.

programme.title: Chopped: Holy Bologna!
programme.desc: Four chefs are forced to get creative from the start when they find a kitschy, oddball cake and an unusual hybrid veggie in their appetizer baskets. An offal surprise and a fun fungus dish keep things interesting in round two.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Hay There!
programme.desc: The family is hauling hay in high summer, so Ree Drummond's taking them cool refreshing strawberry cherry lemon limeade and awesome orange bars and demonstrates a slow cooker lasagne and marinated tomatoes.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Big Game, Big Flavors!
programme.desc: Football is king, but Valerie Bertinelli is queen of the halftime eats! Her family and friends are over to watch the game, so she's making Italian slow-cooked beef sandwiches served with a giardiniera aioli and an Italian-style fennel cole slaw.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Bacon, Bacon, Bacon: Bacon Makes Everything Better
programme.desc: Valerie's friend Jo Stougaard, an authority on the deliciousness of bacon comes over, so Valerie's bringing her 'A' game with an all-bacon menu! She whips up bacon-wrapped jalapeno shrimp with cherry cola.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Homemade Happy Hour
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli invites her glam squad for happy hour, but doesn't wait for the end of a tough workweek on the Valerie's Home Cooking set to start the party!

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Come Cassoulet With Me: A Decadent Dinner On A Dime
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli loves a good slow-cooked dish, and she's making a French classic, cassoulet, for her friend, Chef Ludo Lefebvre. Even though it sounds fancy, Valerie's version is budget-friendly and so delicious!

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Poker Night
programme.desc: It's poker night; Valerie prepares a menu with Southwestern eggrolls with salsa.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: 4th Down and Yum
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli hosts a football-themed party with former NFL pro and Food Network Star, Eddie Jackson. The touchdown-worthy menu includes slow cooker sloppy Joe sliders, homemade potato chips topped with chicken salt, and roasted carrot hummus.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Sharing Chocolate
programme.desc: Ree shares the good stuff with the chocolate lovers in her life, and she's starting big with a magnificent triple chocolate tiramisu as a thank you to her best friend.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Dorm Room Dining
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is sharing some great ideas for simple, minimal-prep dorm room food made with basic tools, such as waffle maker pizzas, paninis and quesadillas. Next, she shows how to use a zipper bag to make a great Caesar salad.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Flippin' Out in the Kitchen
programme.desc: Four chefs kick off Guy Fieri's games by making a lavish Italian feast with only four pounds of ingredients. Next, the chefs flip out when they find they must turn the core ingredients of a Caesar salad into a breakfast dish!

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Express Lane Extreme
programme.desc: Guy Fieri puts the chefs to the test with games of extreme limitations. First, the chefs make their best chicken dish using only eight ingredients. Then, Guy asks for a regional comfort dish with a seven-ingredient limit.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Meals From The Middle Madness
programme.desc: Guy Fieri tests the limits of four chefs by allowing them to shop only in the middle aisles of the store. That means no fresh produce, no fresh meat and no fresh dairy.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Sweet Pawn of Mine
programme.desc: Kick off your shoes with the Pawn Stars when Rick and the Old Man are offered a pair of slippers owned by Pope Leo XIII.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Silver Linings
programme.desc: A guy brings in 100 pounds of pure silver. Rick gets stumped when a seller brings in a mysterious book.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: You're Out
programme.desc: Rick and Chumlee check out a 1969 Camaro Z28 that is in nearly mint condition. Then, a first edition baseball scorebook from 1878 is brought into the shop. Later, Corey visits a financial adviser to help reign in his wild spending habits.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Tough Cookie
programme.desc: Rick tries to get in on a deal involving a gold and silver Remington Arms gun. Then, a collection of Mr.T dolls arrives at the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Mr. Cool
programme.desc: A signed print of Ansel Adam's famous photograph, 'Monolith, the Face of Half Dome,' arrives at the shop. Then, a 1791 one-cent coin is brought in that could be worth a lot of money. Later, Corey notices that Rick keeps taking his things.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: I'll Be Doggone
programme.desc: Rick checks out a jetpack from the Gemini space program. Then, Chumlee's nuts over a Snoopy comic book with a personal drawing from Charles Schulz.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Monumental Pawn
programme.desc: Rick hits the road to take a look at a 1966 Chevy II. Then, he has the task of making a monumental decision when a program from the unveiling of the Statue of Liberty arrives. Later, Corey tries to justify his need for a company car.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: One Man's Junk
programme.desc: A baseball believed to have been signed by the 1959 World Series Champion Dodgers comes in to the shop. Then, Rick checks out a rare movie camera from the 1930s. Also, Old Man seeks revenge when Rick bans junk food in the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: G.I. Pawn
programme.desc: Two rare G.I. Joe playsets, a 1950s Chinese military motorcycle, a photograph and letter signed by poet Henry Wadsworth Longfellow, and an antique Black and Decker drill.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Longshot Pawn
programme.desc: A Nepalese Bira gun from the late 1800s, a 1970s Bob Peak TWA mural, a three-trumpet brass horn.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Rick or Treat
programme.desc: A 19th century vampire killing kit stakes out the shop. Equipment used for paranormal investigations is brought in.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Chum of All Fears
programme.desc: Corey and Chumlee try to pull off the perfect duo Halloween costume. Also, Corey checks out a 1933 Plymouth and a guy brings a 1977 Mattel Electronic Football Game in.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Greatest Pawn on Earth!
programme.desc: An early edition of P.T. Barnum's autobiography has Rick willing to perhaps pay more for the book than it's worth. Curiousity is peaked when Rick is faced with a rare 1966 Doge Charger, complete with a Hemi engine. A Napoleonic era sword fascinates Chum.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: King of Pawntus
programme.desc: Dig up some history with the Pawn Stars when an ancient coin comes rolling into the shop. Will Rick walk away with this shiny silver in his pocket or will he end up empty handed?

programme.title: Pawn Stars: United States of Pawn
programme.desc: One million is on the line when a photograph of Abraham and Mary Todd Lincoln makes its way into the shop. Next, an Easter egg signed by the entire Bush family sends Chumlee hopping.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn Off the Grid
programme.desc: Rick explores a Funko Pop! Mystery Box, while Corey and Chumlee enlist Rick Dale to rescue their fire alarm system. Then, the Pawn Stars get on their motorcycles to ride to Oregon to spruce up Rick's ranch with some new equipment.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Favor, Affection, Malice or Ill-Will

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Emotional Proximity
programme.desc: Olinsky's daughter remains in critical condition following a massive fire, leaving Intelligence on edge, but more determined than ever to track down the suspect.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Remember the Devil
programme.desc: After being tipped off about a woman running barefoot through the woods, Intelligence is led to a kidnapping victim locked up in a shipping container.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Little Bit of Light

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Last Minute Resistance
programme.desc: After encouraging her sister to spend a night out with friends, Burgess wakes up to find that Nicole never made it home. As the guilt begins to eat at Burgess, the team in Intelligence bands together to find Nicole.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Grasping for Salvation
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a teenage boy, Voight finds a connection to an old case. The victim's father, a prominent defense attorney, tries to get the case taken over by Area Central Homicide.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Fagin
programme.desc: The team is called to an in-progress bank robbery and find a detective trying to take over the crime scene. As the robberies continue to be executed around the city, Lindsay is forced to make a decision in the heat of the moment.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Army of One
programme.desc: A live video is streamed online showcasing a tortured man being beaten and burned alive. Upon further investigation, the victim's identity is traced back to that of a man who had been locked up for statutory rape.

programme.title: Wild Borneo

programme.title: Wild Thailand: Monkey Kingdom
programme.desc: Southern Thailand is a place of both spectacular natural beauty and unexpected surprise - where spirituality pervades every bit of life. For the animals that live here, this is a natural wonderland.

programme.title: Wild Thailand: Elephant Forest
programme.desc: In Central Thailands forests, fertile plains and even city streets, nature finds a way of living alongside people.

programme.title: Wild Thailand: Hidden Tiger

programme.title: China's Wild Side: Tibet's Animal Kingdom

programme.title: China's Wild Side: Magical Beasts
programme.desc: Yunnan, China’s kingdom of wildlife, is home to the country’s greatest number of animal species.

programme.title: Battle of the Swamp Dragons
programme.desc: Florida's swamps are ruled by modern-day monsters. Giant alligators and crocodiles hunt side by side in these waters that are teeming with diverse wildlife.

programme.title: Komodo Dragons
programme.desc: We thought we knew everything there was to know about Komodo dragons, those giant reptiles that evolved away from the rest of the living world in an archipelago of a few islands off mainland Indonesia. Now we know that many of our certainties were myths.

programme.title: Crocpocalypse
programme.desc: In the bays and harbors of residential Florida, the threat of a crocodile attack looms as humans become too comfortable around these intelligent predators.

programme.title: Anaconda: Silent Killer

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the Seventh Wonder

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Area 52

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: UFO Tech

programme.title: How It's Made: 3D Signs, Hardwood Floors, Corrugated Polyethylene Pipe, Mattresses
programme.desc: Featuring the production explanation of 3D commercial signs, hardwood floors, corrugated polyethylene pipe and mattresses.

programme.title: How It's Made: Suits of Armor, Street Light Poles, Membrane Switch
programme.desc: Learn how suits of armor, street light poles, bent hardwood and membrane switches are made.

programme.title: Monster Ships: Mega Rig Overhaul
programme.desc: The Saipem 7000 is a gargantuan heavy-lift vessel equipped with two mega-cranes for world's toughest jobs, and now, she's faced with one of her hardest yet: upgrading a 30-year-old oil rig that sits in one of the most treacherous seas in the world.

programme.title: Monster Ships: Titan of the Great Lakes
programme.desc: One of the largest ships of the Great Lakes is a mammoth freighter named the Algoma Sault, and she and her crew face deadly ice, killer fog, and treacherous canal crossings to safely transport 28,000 tons of coal in a race against the clock.

programme.title: Monster Ships: Titan of the Deep
programme.desc: A colossal container ship must use cutting-edge tech and the latest marine engineering to brave treacherous tidal waters in a race against the clock to deliver perishable cargo.

programme.title: Monster Ships: Hell on Water
programme.desc: The Thermopylae is a massive vehicle carrier and one of the biggest ships ever built, and facing rough waves on deadly seas, her crew must navigate their priceless cargo to destinations on the other side of the world.

programme.title: Monster Ships: Cruise Ship Colossus
programme.desc: The Crown Princess is a titanic cruise ship that weighs over 100,000 tons, and in a race against the clock, its crew must use the latest tech and cutting-edge engineering to prepare for their next voyage.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: The Chernobyl Conspiracy
programme.desc: The Chernobyl nuclear disaster was a catastrophe that changed the course of human history, and now, new discoveries reveal the real reasons behind the explosion that spawned a deadly radioactive ghost town and brought down an empire.

programme.title: Female Forces: Crash Makeover
programme.desc: Betsy and Officer Julie Lardino convince Officer Tracy to undergo a head-to-toe makeover while still keeping the city safe.

programme.title: Female Forces: For Better or for Worse
programme.desc: Officer Dawn Yorke tries to settle domestic dispute with a wife who refuses to let her abusive husband back into their home. Next, Sgt. Betsy Brantner-Smith gives a good lecture to a husband who gets pulled over after bickering with his wife.

programme.title: Female Forces: Red Alert
programme.desc: Betsy, Julie and Tracy release some aggression and train for hand-to-hand combat with their nightstick batons. Officer Dawn Yorke deals with a belligerent homeless man accused of casing a parking lot for possible theft.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Meagan's Ghost

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Victim's Revenge
programme.desc: The team finds that a young girl's suicide in 1916 could have been a murder and that her aggressor is still hanging around the campus hoping to find his next victim.

programme.title: American Justice: A Warrant to Kill
programme.desc: A look at the dispute between Deputy Sheriff Joseph Kent McGowan and Susan White.

programme.title: American Justice: Crime Family
programme.desc: A profile of infamous mob boss Vito Genovese and how he built the most ruthless and powerful crime family in the nation. Includes interviews with Genovese's godson, FBI agents and prosecutors.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Family Ties
programme.desc: Family bonds and family struggles take center stage when a man approaches Robb and Bethany and asks them to help find his missing daughter whom he fears is dead. The ROC squad set up a high-profile sting to capture a group of thieves preying on Tampa.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: Officers Roni and Cooper find themselves in a breathless foot chase after people are stabbed at a nightclub. Fire rescue's Doug and Stokes desperately try to save the life of a young man shot in his throat. A carjacking leads to a manhunt.

programme.title: I Solved a Murder: Adam Bruckner
programme.desc: A woman is found murder and hanging in Philadelphia and a professional soccer player steps in to help solve the crime.

programme.title: I Solved a Murder: Sheila Wysocki
programme.desc: A woman is viciously murdered and police run out of leads until her best friend takes on the case herself.

programme.title: I Solved a Murder: Melinda Elkins
programme.desc: A woman tries to clear her husband after police say he committed a heinous murder.

programme.title: Grace vs. Abrams
programme.desc: Nancy Grace and Dan Abrams debate infamous crimes and legal cases.

programme.title: Marcia Clark Investigates The First 48: Jam Master Jay
programme.desc: Marcia Clark dives deep into the world of hip hop to search for the truth of what really happened to legendary DJ, Jam Master Jay. Marcia will navigate the twists and turns of numerous theories that surround the mysterious death of this icon.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Death by Neighbor
programme.desc: New beginnings take a horrible turn when members of a blended family become deathly ill after ingesting a rare poison.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Desperate Times, Deadly Measures
programme.desc: An Appalachian couple is delighted when their neighbors return home after mysteriously disappearing for ten years. But they've changed, for the worse, unleashing a campaign of endless intimidation and harassment that ultimately ends in a bloodbath.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Cock-a-Doodle-Dead
programme.desc: A homeowner hopes the renters who move into the house beside him will be much better behaved than the previous tenants. When he determines they're not, the stage is set for bloody conflict and a shocking act of violence that threatens to claim many lives.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Deadly Duplex
programme.desc: After an early retirement, a man buys a duplex and rents half of it out to a troubled family. With the help of his gun, he sends an abusive husband packing and sets his sights on the wife.

programme.title: Relatively Evil: Masked Motives
programme.desc: After dating a short time, Tyrone Coles asks Denise Gay to move in with him even though family members on both sides oppose this arrangement. A series of tense confrontations leads to a vicious murder and twisted cover up.

programme.title: Truth About Murder With Sunny Hostin: Terrible Place to Die
programme.desc: A stranger brutally attacks two young women in a park in Portland, Texas. One victim is killed, while the other, miraculously survives. With the help of the survivor, investigators desperately hunt for the killer before he can strike again.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Deadly Turn
programme.desc: A couple escapes the hazards of the big city and moves to a country community. But suspicion that their new neighbors are in the drug trade turns into bloody rage with children in caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Relatively Evil: Masked Motives
programme.desc: After dating a short time, Tyrone Coles asks Denise Gay to move in with him even though family members on both sides oppose this arrangement. A series of tense confrontations leads to a vicious murder and twisted cover up.

programme.desc: A stranger brutally attacks two young women in a park in Portland, Texas. One victim is killed, while the other, miraculously survives. With the help of the survivor, investigators desperately hunt for the killer before he can strike again.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Deadly Turn
programme.desc: A couple escapes the hazards of the big city and moves to a country community. But suspicion that their new neighbors are in the drug trade turns into bloody rage with children in caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Deadly Duplex
programme.desc: After an early retirement, a man buys a duplex and rents half of it out to a troubled family. With the help of his gun, he sends an abusive husband packing and sets his sights on the wife.

programme.title: Dead of Night: I Know What Happened to That Girl
programme.desc: A young college student vanishes quietly into the darkness. Months later a shocking discovery is made, and the residents of the small town begin to question those they once believed were innocent. Before long, the truth will rise from the dead of night.

programme.title: Dead of Night: Nothing to Hide
programme.desc: In Bend, Oregon, Halloween night ends with a young woman's sudden disappearance. Suspicion of foul play runs deep, but her whereabouts remain a mystery. Over time, secrets begin to emerge and lead investigators to the least likely of suspects.

programme.title: Hear No Evil: Sex, Lies and Audiotape
programme.desc: A mom accused of the murder of a stranger must clear her name by secretly-recording a confession from the man she claims is framing her. Sordid revelations of a secret life lead police to prove the guilt of an obsessive, cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Hear No Evil: Dead and Deleted
programme.desc: A mom of 3 in Georgia is killed after vanishing from home. Vital clues in the form of audio files captured by her tech-obsessed husband may be key to solving the mystery. As cops scrutinize the sounds, they make a grim discovery that betrays her killer.

programme.title: Hear No Evil: Whispers from the Dead
programme.desc: In Little Falls, Minn., a retiree's peace is shattered by a home break-in, culminating in a gruesome double-homicide. Investigators discover audio recordings of the killings, revealing what really happened and the killer's true motives.

programme.title: Dateline: The Devil in Disguise
programme.desc: An ex-Navy man marries the love of his life. Five months later his new bride finds him dead on their bedroom floor. With no apparent cause of death, family and authorities are left puzzled.

programme.title: Dateline: The Night Before Halloween
programme.desc: In 1984, Robin Hoynes was murdered during a robbery attempt at the restaurant where she worked. An investigation spanning two decades finally leads police to a small, overlooked piece of evidence that points directly to her killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Bad Blood
programme.desc: Identical twin daughters find their young mother dead at home in their safe, gated community. As the investigation begins, detectives uncover clues buried in the victim's past, plus a hidden diary.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Cost of Competition
programme.desc: When the home of the Resaca, Georgia 'Carpet King' is showered with gunfire and kills beloved daughter Tara Swilley, the self-made millionaire is convinced one of his business partners must be behind the killing.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Roses are Red, Murder is Too
programme.desc: When a town counsel member is found murdered in her home, residents of Berryville, Virginia are appalled. With the only evidence being the single bullet that took her life, the slaying begins to look more and more like a professional hit.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Horror in the Heartland
programme.desc: Neighbors are sometimes miles apart in the tiny town of Horton, Kansas, but news travels fast when Patricia Kimmi disappears from her home. Evidence leads investigators to believe she may not be found alive. And worse, that her killer still lurks.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Answering the Call
programme.desc: When a brush fire is reported in rural Winchester, TN, first responders are horrified to find the body of young Megan Sharpton at the center of the blaze.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Rearview Mirror
programme.desc: When a retired military man runs over a pedestrian, it's up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine if it was bad brakes or bad intent. Then A shooting in a dive bar leads to a quick arrest, but Kenda can't quite shake the feeling that something is amiss.

programme.title: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: The story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Discovering America
programme.desc: Explore the truth behind the men who discovered the New World and take a trip to discover the real facts behind the most famous bridge and road in America.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Engineering America
programme.desc: Learn the truth behind the myths that surround our most revered patriotic symbols and we unveil the surprising facts of two great feats of engineering: the Panama Canal and the Transcontinental Railroad.

programme.title: American Titans: Edison vs. Tesla
programme.desc: In the late 1800's a new life-changing electrical industry emerges with the two greatest minds of the day, Thomas Edison and Nikola Tesla, backing opposing positions on how the multi-million dollar industry will transmit power for the next century.

programme.title: American Titans: Rockefeller vs. Scott
programme.desc: John D. Rockefeller, the young new king of kerosene, and Thomas A. Scott, the visionary behind the Pennsylvania Railroad Company, battle for control of America's new oil industry.

programme.title: American Titans: Vanderbilt vs. Drew
programme.desc: Railroad kingpin Cornelius Vanderbilt takes on his old friend Daniel Drew in a Wall Street war for the Erie Railroad. Vanderbilt has millions, but sly Drew and his protégés, Jay Gould and Jim Fisk, are set to break the bank of America's biggest tycoon.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Striking it Rich
programme.desc: Discover the real facts behind America's biggest economic boom and biggest bust, and learn the truth behind some of Las Vegas' greatest myths.
